Mark4:36 Ene anga a sulula o mundu, a xa o kifuẋi, he a di longa mu bote muala Jezú, anga aia-nê. Ni jibote jamukua jala-bhu, ji ila-nâ kumoxi." 
Mark4:37 Ku musanza anga ku balumuka kitembu kia suina, mabhuku ma kala mu ku di lukula mu bote, o iene i sota kuizala ni menha." 
Mark4:38 Muene-phe, ku dizulu dia bote, ua zeka ku phetu, uaii ku kilu. Anga eza ku mu tonesa, exi: Mesene, kífua ki ki ku kuatela kima? Tuanda kufua!" 
Mark4:39 Muene anga u tona, u kidika o kitembu, he u ambela o menha, uixi: Batamenu mu dixibhe! Kitembu anga ki batama, kuma ku kala kutululuka kua nzungule." 
Mark4:40 Anga ua ambela, uixi: Mualela-hi ni uoma kiki? Kífua kiluua mu xikana?" 
Mark4:41 Uôma anga u a kuata kiavulu, a di ambela mudia, exi: Mukua-hi muene u kala kiki, u bhinga ni kitembu ni mabhuku ma mu belesela?" 
Mark5:1 Jezú ni maxibulu mê anga a kuáka ku sambua dia kizanga kia Ngalileia, kʼoxi ia akua Ngelengesa." 
Mark5:2 O kia zubha kutomboka mu bote, kithanganʼokio u takana ni muthu ua tundu mu jimbila, uala ni nzumbi iaxidi." 
Mark5:3 O mu jimbila, muene kia mua tungu. Muenhu kana muthu ua tena ku mu kuta, ne ku malubhambu." 
Mark5:4 Kuma a mu kuta jinga kia luavulu, o inama ni maku ni jingidinhá ni malubhambu; maji o malubhambu-phe u ma bula, o jingidinhá u ji bukujula! Kana muthu uala ni nguzu ia ku mu lenda ni ku mu tolola." 
Mark5:5 Ni mu muanha ni mu usuku, u nanga jinga ku jimbila ni ku milundu, mu kudikola-kola ni ku di kuama ni matadi." 
Mark5:6 O kia mono Jezú mu ikanga, ueza ni kulenga, he u fukama, u mu bheza;" 
Mark5:7 anga u di kola ni dízui dia suina, uixi: Eme nga kuata-hi ni eie, u Jezú, u Monʼa Nzambi, ua suka ku ukota? Nga ku bhingi mu dijina dia Nzambi, kana ku ngi talesa hadi." 
Mark5:8 Muene ua zuela kiki, mukonda o Jezú ua dianga ku mu ambela, uixi: Tunda mu mukutu ua muthu, eie u nzumbi iaxidi." 
Mark5:9 Jezú ua mu ibhula, uixi: Dijina diê, eie nanhi? Kuala muene: Dijina diami Kifuẋi, mukonda tua vulu." 
Mark5:10 Anga u kala mu diondolola Jezú kuila o nzumbi jaxidi, kana ku ji kaia mʼoxi ienhoio." 
Mark5:11 Bhenhobho-phe mu mulundu mu kala kilunga kia dikota kia jingulu jala mu mudia bhua butu. 
Mark5:12 Anga o jinzumbi jene a mu dionda, exi: Tu tume koko, nda tu bokone mu jingulu!" 
Mark5:13 Jezú anga ua ehela. O jinzumbi jaxidi anga ji tunda, ji bokona mu jingulu. Kilunga kioso anga ki kulumuka o muzeii ni lusolo, kate mu kizanga, midi jiiadi ja jingulu anga ji fundala mu menha." 
Mark5:14 Oso a kexile ku jʼinga-phe, a lenga, a ki tanga ku mbonge ni ku tutu. Anga athu avulu eza ku sanga kioso kia bhiti." 
Mark5:15 A bhixila kua Jezú, he a talesa o muthu ua salukile ni madimonho, ma kexile kifuẋi, ua zuata, ua tambula kilunji. Anga a kala ni uoma!" 
Mark5:16 Io oso a ki mono, anga a a jimbuila kioso kia bhiti na-kiu iu ua salukile ni madimonho, ni kia bhange o jingulu." 
Mark5:17 Anga a kuata ku mu dionda kutunda mu mikau ia. 
Mark5:18 O kia kala mu ku di longa mu bote, iu ua salukile ni madimonho u mu dionda, phala ku mu ehela ku kala-nê." 
Mark5:19 Jezú-phe ka mu ehela, uixi: Ndeie ku bhata, ku jindandu je, ua ka a tangele ima ia ku bhange Ngana Nzambi, ni kia ku kuatela henda." 
Mark5:20 Muene anga u katuka, u kuata ku ki fumanenesa mu Dekapolo ima ioso ia mu bhange Jezú. Athu oso anga a diuana." 
Mark5:21 Kia zubha Jezú kuzauka dingi ku sambua, o mundu ua mu bhongolokela, anga u kala bhu mbandu ia kizanga." 
Mark5:22 Anga ku mu sanga muthu ua tokala ku makota ma dilombe dijina diê Jailu, o kia mu mono, iu ua di bhale bhu inama ie." 
Mark5:23 Anga u mu dionda kiavulu, uixi: Kamona kami, ka muhatu, ua kumbama! Ize, u Ngana, u mu tule maku mê ku thandu, mbe u mu sake, a bhuluke!" 
Mark5:24 Anga u katuka-nê, o mundu uavulu ua mu kaiela, edi muene bhiki-bhiki." 
Mark5:25 Anga bhu kala muhatu ua kate kibhubhe kia manhinga, ua bhange nakiu kia kuinhi dia muvu ní iadi," 
Mark5:26 Jimbongo je joso ja kexile na-ju, ua ji texile ku imbanda. Maji o imbanda, bhu kididi kia ku mu kuatekesa, a mu tatesa dingi kiavulu, ne ngo kuiluka; maji o uhaxi ue uavulu dingi." 
Mark5:27 Kuma uevu o fuma ia Jezú, ua mu zukama ku dima mu kaxi ka mundu, iu ua mu babata ku kizuatu kie." 
Mark5:28 Mukonda uixi: Se nga mu babata ngo ku kizuatu kie, ngi di sanza." 
Mark5:29 Kithanganʼokio o kibhubhe kie kia manhinga kia batuka, anga u ívua mu mukutu ue kuma uhaxi ue ueluka." 
Mark5:30 Jezú-phe kithanganʼokio kuma uevu kuila mu mukutu ue mua tundu umbanda, ua sakukila o mundu, uixi: Mukuahi ua ngi babata o kizuatu?" 
Mark5:31 Kuala jixibulu je: O mundu ua u mono a ku xina, uixi: Mukua-hi ua ngi babata?" 
Mark5:32 Muene-phe u kuata kukengelela mu mundu, ua bhindamena kumona-bhu uoso ua bhange kienhiki." 
Mark5:33 O muhatu-phe ni kuteketa ni uoma, kuma uejiia kioso kia mu bhiti, ueza, ua di bhale bhu pholo ie, iu ua mu tangela o kidi kioso." 
Mark5:34 Muene iu ua mu ambela, uixi: Mona, o kuxikana kue, kua ku bhulula. Ndeie ni kutululuka, u di sanze ku uhaxi ue." 
Mark5:35 Kioso-phe Jezú kia kexile hanji mu zuela, ku dibhata dia dikota dia dilombe ku tunda athu, exi: Na Jailu, monʼê uafu kia. O mesene u mu talesela-hi ngo hadi?" 
Mark5:36 Jezú-phe ka a suu kia zuela, u ambela dikota dia dilombe, uixi: Ku kale ni hele! Xikana ngo." 
Mark5:37 Muene kʼehela dingi muthu ku mu kaiela, kikale ngo Phetele, ni Tiiaku, ni Nzuá phange ia Tiiaku." 
Mark5:38 Anga a bhixila kʼonzo ia dikota dia dilombe, u sanga o mundu edi ngo bulukutu ni kudila ni kubhana jingololo." 
Mark5:39 O Muene kia zubha kubokona, uixi: Muedila-hi bulukutu, ni kudila? Mona kʼafu, uaii ngo ku kilu." 
Mark5:40 Anga a mu olela uoua. Muene-phe u a tubhula bhu kanga ene oso, u katula ngo tata ni mama avu kamona ka, ni io oso ueza-nâ, anga u bokona muala o mona." 
Mark5:41 Anga u kuata o mona mu lukuaku, u mu ambela, uixi: Talita, kumi! Uambe, mu ku ki jimbulula: Kilumba, nga ku tumu kubalumuka!" 
Mark5:42 Kithanganʼokio o kilumba u balumuka, he u enda, kuma uala kia mu kuinhi dia muvu niʼiadi. Enhoso kithanganʼokio anga a diuana kisuma kia dikota." 
Mark5:43 Bhenhobho Jezú muene u a kidika kiavulu, uixi: Kana ku ki tanga anga u tuma ku mu bhana kudia." 
Mark6:1 Muene anga u tunda bhenhobho, u vutuka kʼoxi ie, mu sanzala ia Nazalé, mua tungile, muene ni jixibulu je jeza-nê kumoxi." 
Mark6:2 Kutula kia sabhalu, u kuata kulonga mu dilombe. Anga athu ki a mu ivu, a diuana, exi: Muenhu ima ioso iíi, ua di longela na-iu kuebhi? Kuebhi kua mu bhana o kuijiia kuosʼuku? Ni isuma ioso iíi, ia mu di bhanga kiebhi bhu maku mê?" 
Mark6:3 Manhi ki muene musongi a mabaiʼu, monʼa Madiia, phange ia Tiiaku ni Zuze ni Juda, ni Ximá? Ni jiphange je ja ahatu, ki etu-nâ mu ʼaxaxe kʼetu? Anga a mu lebhula." 
Mark6:4 Jezú-phe uixi: O polofeta kana bhama bhu mu kamba ujitu, kikale ngo kʼoxi ie, ni ku jindandu je, ni ku bhata diê." 
Mark6:5 Muene mueneʼomo mu Nazalé ka tenene dingi kubhanga-mu kisumua; kima ngo kia bhange, ua tula maku mê ku thanduʼa jihaxi jimoxi-moxi-mu, iu ua ji sake." 
Mark6:6 Anga u diuana mukonda dia kuxibhaka kua. Jezú anga u nhunga kia ngo mu jisanzala ni kulonga. 
Mark6:7 Anga u ixana o kuinhi dia xibulu ni kiiadi, u kuata ku a tuma ku ukunji mu kiiadi-kiiadi, ni ku a bhana o kutena kua ku kaia ni kutumina jinzumbi jaxidi." 
Mark6:8 Anga u a tendelela kuma: Ki mu ambate huta ia njila, kabasa mbangala; kana mbolo, kana muxila, kana kitadi mu phonda;" 
Mark6:9 maji mu zuata jihaii, uixi-phe o madivunga ki mu zuate maiadi." 
Mark6:10 Uixi dingi: Dioso dibhata di mua tula, inzo ioso i mu bokona, muene mu mu kala, kate ki mu katuka." 
Mark6:11 Bhuoso-phe bhua kamba ku mi tambulula, ni ku mʼívua, ki mu tunda-bhu mu a kukumuina fufuta ia mi naminina ku inama, mu ku a bhana umbangi ua kuela kua. Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela, kuma akua Sodoma ni Ngomola a ka beta ku a lendukila mu kizuua kia kufundisa, akua kididi kiokio kana." 
Mark6:12 O maxibulu anga a muangana, he a longa maka kuma athu a tokala kudiela ni kueha o ituxi ia." 
Mark6:13 A tundisa madimonho, o jihaxi, a ji uaia maji, he a ji saka." 
Mark6:14 Sobha Helode anga u kʼivua, kuma o dijina dia Jezú dia fumana kuene kuoso. Amoxi exi: Nzuá dia Batizu ua fukunuka ku ʼalunga! Kiene kia vudila o kutena kua kubhanga isuma kiki." 
Mark6:15 Amukuá-phe exi: Elija. Amukuá exi: Polofeta, mukua ni jipolofeta jòkulu." 
Mark6:16 Helode-phe kia kʼivu, uixi: Nzuá dia Batizu nga mu batuile o mutue, muene ua fukununa!" 
Mark6:17 Kuma Helode muene ua tumine kukuata Nzuá, anga u mu kuikila mu ʼaleia, mukonda dia Helodiia mukaji a phangʼiê Felipe, kuma ua mu sakana." 
Mark6:18 Mukonda Nzuá uambelele Helode, uixi: Ki kola, eie kukala ni mukaji a phangʼié!" 
Mark6:19 Helodiia anga u mu kuatela luma, u mesena ku mu jibha, maji ka tenene ku ki bhanga." 
Mark6:20 Mukonda Helode muene ua kexile ni uoma ua Nzuá, mbata ua mu ijiia kuma muthu ua iuka, muthu ua ngene ukola, iu ua mu bhake bhua kondama. O ki a mu ivua jinga kuzuela, u tandanganha, ni kia kubhanga ka ki mono. Suke kiene, maji u kala ni vondadi ia ku mu ivua." 
Mark6:21 Ku bhiẋila-phe bhu kizuua kia tokala kia Helode kutenesa mivu, u bhangesa kizokola kia jitata je, ni jikabhitangu, ni adiakimi a Ngalileia." 
Mark6:22 O kieza monʼa Helodiia muene, anga u kina, Helode kia mu uabhela, ni io oso a xikama-nê ku meza. O sobha anga uambela monʼa kilumba, uixi: Bhinga kioso ki ua mesena, ngi ku bhane-kiu." 
Mark6:23 Anga u mu lokela, uixi: Kioso ki u bhinga, ngi ku bhane-kiu! Kate ni usobha uami, se eie u u bhinga mbandu, tu u uane mu kaxi!" 
Mark6:24 Muene anga u tunda, uia kua mamʼa, uixi: Ngi bhinga-hi? Uixi: Bhinga o mutue ua Nzuá dia Batizu." 
Mark6:25 Kithangana kienhókio monʼa kilumba u bokona muala sobha ni lusolo, he u bhinga, uixi: Nga solo kuila u ngi bhana kindalʼiki, bhu dilonga, o mutue ua Nzuá dia Batizu." 
Mark6:26 Sobha anga Ukenana kiavulu, lamba dia mu kuata. Maji mukonda-phe dia kuloka kue, ni dia ia a xikama-nê ku meza, nguaiê ku mu di tuna." 
Mark6:27 Kithanganʼokio sobha u katula disoladi ku alangidiʼê, u tuma mutue ua Nzuá dia Batizu. Muene anga uia mu ʼaleia, u batula mutue ua Nzuá." 
Mark6:28 Anga u bheka mutue bhu dilonga, u u bhana monʼa kilumba; o monʼa kilumba anga u u bhana mamʼa." 
Mark6:29 Jixibulu ja Nzuá ki a zubha ku kʼivua, eza, a zangula kimbi kie, anga a mu funda." 
Mark6:30 Jipoxolo anga ji bhongoloka kua Jezú, a mu jimbuila ima ioso ia bhange ene, ni ioso ia longo." 
Mark6:31 Muene iu ua ambela, uixi: Zenu: Tuienu kʼubheka uetu ku mukau, tu nhohe-ku bhuofele. Kuma athu avulu a kexi mu kuia ni kuiza, kate Jezú ni maxibulu mê ni kithangana ngo kia kudia ka ki mono." 
Mark6:32 Anga aia mu bote ku kididi kia ubheka ku mukau. 
Mark6:33 Mundu uavulu-phe a a mono kuia, ndumba a ejiia kuila ene. Anga a lengela bhoxi kate bhenhobho, a tundu mu jimbonge joso, anga a dianga kubhiẋila." 
Mark6:34 Muene kia zubha kutomboka, u sanga kifuẋi kia dikota, anga u a kuatela henda, kuma edi kala jimbudi ja kambe mubidi. Anga u kuata ku a longa ima iavulu." 
Mark6:35 O kia lembe o dikumbi, jixibulu je jiza kua Muene, exi: Kunu mu iangu mu tuala, o kumbi dia lembe kia." 
Mark6:36 A muanganese, mbe a bhite ku jisanzala, a sumbe kudia." 
Mark6:37 Muene-phe ua a vutuila, uixi: Enuenu a bhanienu kudia. Kuala ene: Kífua tuia ku a sumbila jimbolo ji ta hama jiiadi ja madenádia, anga tu a bhana-ju?!" 
Mark6:38 Kuala muene: Muala ni mbolo jikuẋi? Ka talesienu. O kia zubha ku talesa exi: Jitanu, ni mbiji jiiadi." 
Mark6:39 Jezú bhenhobho iu ua a tumu kuxikama ku iangu ia uisu, mu ibuka-ibuka." 
Mark6:40 Ene he a xikama ku misambu, kala kibuka hama, kala kibuka makuinhi atanu." 
Mark6:41 Muene anga u tambula o mbolo jitanu ni mbiji jiiadi, u bhetula mesu ku diulu, he u sakidila Nzambi. U bhasujula o jimbolo, anga u ji bhana jixibulu phala ku a uanena. Ni jimbiji ua a uanena-ju ene oso." 
Mark6:42 Ene oso anga a dia, he ekuta." 
Mark6:43 O ku ibhasu ia jimbolo ni ia jimbiji ia subhuka-ku, a i nona kuinhi dia ngalu ni jiiadi jezala." 
Mark6:44 Ene-phe adi ku jimbolo, a tena midi jitanu ja muthu." 
Mark6:45 Kithanganʼokio Jezú u tuma jixibulu je ku di lônga mu bote, ni ku mu tuamenena ku sambua ku Betesáida, kioso kia xala muene ni kumuanganesa o kifuẋi." 
Mark6:46 O kia zubha ku di lekela-nê, iu ua bande ku mulundu mu kusamba." 
Mark6:47 Kutula mu ngoloxi, o kuma ki kua vundu, o bote ia kala kia mu kaxi ka musanza, o muene ua xala hanji ku kanga ubheka ue." 
Mark6:48 O kia mono a tate ni kuzaula, ala kubhanga ni kitembu, mu kilangidilu kia kauana kia usuku, kuila kuma ku kuandeka kia kukia, muene uiza ni kuendela ku thanduʼa menha, kate bhuala ene, he uila kala ua-nda ku a somboka." 
Mark6:49 Ene-phe kia mono Jezú uala kuendela ku thanduʼa menha, a fika exi kilulu, anga a di kola." 
Mark6:50 Kuma ene oso a mu mono, a tukumuka. Muene-phe kithanganʼokio u a zuelesa, uixi: Tululukenu, eme-muene! Ki mu kale ni uoma!" 
Mark6:51 Anga u bhixila ku bote, u di longa momo. Kitembu anga ki batuka! Ene ku miẋima ia anga a diuana kiavulu, a kala mu teketa." 
Mark6:52 Kuma ni kisúmua kia jimbolo ki kia a tetulukila luua, inda o miẋima ia-phe hanji ia kolo." 
Mark6:53 O kia zubha kuzauka, Jezú ni maxibulu mê a kuaka kʼoxi ia Jenezalé, o bote a i kuikila ku ngonguenha." 
Mark6:54 O kia zubha kutomboka, athu kindala Jezú a mu ijiia." 
Mark6:55 A lengela ku mbandu joso, a kuata ku mu tutila o jihaxi joso ja zeka bhu mianza ia, bhuoso Jezú bhua mu ivu bhuala." 
Mark6:56 Muene bhuoso bhua tula jinga, mu jimbonge ni mu jisanzala, ni ku matutu, jihaxi a ji bheka mu jinzunga, anga a mu dionda kuila a mu kuate ngo ku muxiku ua kizuatu kiê. O oso a mu kuata, anga eluka." 
Mark7:1 Kua mu bhongolokela jifalizeu ni amoxi-moxi ku jimesene ja Kitumu a tundile ku Jeluzaleme. 
Mark7:2 Ene a mono jixibulu je jimoxi-mu jí jidia mbolo ni maku maxidi, kuma ki mòsukule, kala kiene mu tuma o jifalizeu mundu kubhanga." 
Mark7:3 Mbata jifalizeu ni Jijudé joso kene kudia se kusukujula kiavulu o maku, mukonda a kuata kijila kia akulu-a-ndamba." 
Mark7:4 Kia tunda ue bhu kitanda, kikale a dianga kusukula o ima ioso ia tundu na-iu bhu kitanda ni ku dʼiẋika, nʼa die kiua. Sai ue dingi ni ijila iamukua iavulu ia kuata, kala kusukujula jixikala, ni jímbia, ni malongʼa ngondo." 
Mark7:5 Jifalizeu ni jimesene ene mu longa o Kitumu, anga eza kua Jezú, a mu ibhula, exi: Phala-hi jixibulu je ji kamba kukuata kijila kia akulu-a-ndamba, adia ni maku maxidi?" 
Mark7:6 Muene ua ambela, uixi: Mu akua mangonha! Izaia kidi kiê kia mi soneka enu, uixi: Nzambi uambe kuma: Athu ia a ngi xila ngo ni mizumbu ia, maji o miẋima ia-phe ia ngi kala kua lebha." 
Mark7:7 A ngi bheza-phe ngo makutu ni kulonga ijila ia tumu ngo athu, kala Nzambi muene ua i tumu." 
Mark7:8 Enu mu-xa kitumu kia Nzambi, mu kuata kijila kia athu, kala mu kusukula jímbia ni jikopho. Sai ue ima iamukua dingi iavulu i mu bhanga." 
Mark7:9 Uixi dingi: Kidi kiene, kuma enu izuua ioso muene mu mona ndunge ia kuxa bhu mbandu o Kitumu kia Nzambi, phala mu kuate ngo o kífua kienu." 
Mark7:10 Kuma Mozé, uixi: Tatʼenu ni mamʼenu a bhane ujitu. Uixi dingi: Uoso u xinga tatʼâ mba mamʼa, muthu ua ku mu jibha." 
Mark7:11 Enu-phe mu longa, muixi: Se muthu u tena kubhandulula tatʼâ mba mamʼa, maji u ambela tatʼâ mba mamʼa kuila: Kioso ki mueji kudia ko kuami, nga ki lumbila Nzambi:" 
Mark7:12 Muthu io ka bhingi dingi kuila tatʼâ ni mamʼa ua a bhanga ujitu. 
Mark7:13 Kienhiki, o Maka ma Nzambi mua ma selula ni kífua kienu ki mua tambula ku jitata jenu, ni ku ki sambukisa ku alulu ni ku alaula. Sai ue dingi ima iavulu i mu bhanga, ia difu kiki." 
Mark7:14 Jezú anga u ixana dingi o kifuẋi, he ua ambela, uixi: Ivenu enu oso kioso ki nga-nda kuzuela nda mu ijiie:" 
Mark7:15 Kana kima ku kanga dia muthu ki tena ku mu bokona ni ki mu kasanesa; maji o ima-phe i tunda moxi dia muthu, iene i kasanesa o muthu. [" 
Mark7:16 Uoso uala ni matui ma kuívua, evue.]" 
Mark7:17 O kia zubha kubokona mʼonzo, kifuẋi ua ki xi, jixibulu je ji mu ibhula o kixanga." 
Mark7:18 Muene, uixi: Enu mua soko ni akuenu! Kífua ki mualʼiki, enu uenu, mua kambe kuijiia? Ki mu kʼivu, kuma kioso ku kanga ki bokona mu muthu ki ki tena ku mu kasanesa?" 
Mark7:19 mukonda ki ki bokona mu muẋima, maji ki bokona mu mala, anga ki tundila bhoxi? Mu kuzuela kiki, Jezú uambe kuila makudia oso muthu u tenʼê ku a dia." 
Mark7:20 Uixi: Kioso ki tunda moxiʼ a muthu, kiene ki kasanesa o muthu." 
Mark7:21 Kuma moxi, ku miẋima ia athu, kuene ku tunda ilunji iaiibha: Maundu-mbu, mauíii, ijibha, jiphanda, unjènje, makutu," 
Mark7:22 Maluimbi, úsueia, ufumbe, ufusa, dixinga, jindaka, kutatela, ukumbu, uoua." 
Mark7:23 Ima ioso iíi iaiibha i tunda moxi, iene i kasanesa o muthu." 
Mark7:24 Jezú anga u balumuka, uia ku jimbandu ja Tilu ni Sidonia. Kuenhoko hé u bokona mʼonzo, mukonda ka mesenene kuila athu a kʼijiia kuma Muene iu bhobho. Maji o kusuama-phe ki kua xikina." 
Mark7:25 Kithanganʼokio-phe muhatu uavu kamona-kê ka muhatu, kala ni nzumbi ia xidi, uevu athu ala kuzuela Jezú. Muene anga uiza u di bhala bhu inama iê." 
Mark7:26 Muhatu iú-phe ngelèku, mukua muiji ua Silofenixa. Anga u mu dionda kuila a tundise o dimonho mu mukutu ua monʼe." 
Mark7:27 Muene-phe, uixi: Ehela phala o tuana a diange kuikuta. Mukonda ki ki tokala kukatula o kudia kua tuana, nʼa ku tela o jímbua." 
Mark7:28 Muhatu ua mu vutuila, uixi: Kidi, Ngana! Maji o jímbua-phe, moxiʼ a meza, jídia ku jisesekenha ja lalumuna o tuana." 
Mark7:29 Kuala muene: Mukonda dia kuvutula kue kua mbote, kiene ki ua ki zuelʼokio, ki di bhange; ndeie kia ku bhata. O dimonho dia tundu kia mu mukutu ua monʼe." 
Mark7:30 O muhatu anga uia kuʼonzo iê, u sanga o mona ua zeka bhu hama, o dimonho dia tundu kiá mómuʼê." 
Mark7:31 Kutunda dingi mu jimbandu ja Tilu, Jezú u bhita mu Sidonha, he uiza ku kizanga kia Ngalileia, bhu jimbandu ja Dekapolo." 
Mark7:32 Anga bhu kala athu a mu bhekela muxilu, mukua kukukuma mu kuzuela, he a mu dionda phala a mu tule maku mê." 
Mark7:33 Muene anga u mu katula mu kifuẋi, u sondoloka-nê, u mu ta milembu mu matui, u ta mathe, anga ni mathe enhó u mu babata bhu dimi." 
Mark7:34 Bhenhobho anga u talesa ku diulu, u di tula muenhu, uixi: Efata, kífua uambe, uixi: Xitunuka!" 
Mark7:35 Mátui-mê anga ma xitunuka, o dimi die di zoza mu kithangana kienhókio, anga u zuela, u batula kiambote." 
Mark7:36 Muene anga u a tendelela kuma ka ki tangele muthu; ene-phe a suina ni ku ki fumanesa. 
Mark7:37 Anga a diuana dingi kiavulu, exi: Muene o ima ioso u i bhanga kiambote! U bhangesa kuila o mixilu evua, o mabubu a zuela!" 
Mark8:1 Mu izuua muenhomo, kukala dingi kifuẋi kia dikota, anga a kamba kudia. Muene anga u ixana jixibulu je ua ambela, uixi:" 
Mark8:2 O mundu nga a kuatela henda, mukonda nga bhange-nê kia izuua itatu, kala dingi ni kudia." 
Mark8:3 Se nga a muanganesa ni nzala, kuia ku mabhata ma, a-nda kusendukila mu njila, mukonda amoxi-mu a tundu dikanga." 
Mark8:4 Kuala jixibulu: Kúdia-phe tu ku sanga kuebhi mu iangʼumu, kua kuila athu osoʼá ekuta?" 
Mark8:5 Uixi: Muala ni mbolo jikuẋi? Exi sambuadi. 
Mark8:6 Muene anga u tuma o kifuẋi kuxikama bhoxi. U katula sambuadi dia mbolo, o kia zubha kusakidila Nzambi u ji bhasujula, u ji bhana ku jixibulu je ku a tudila; ene anga a tudila o mundu." 
Mark8:7 A kala ue ni tumbiji. Muene anga u tu benzela, u tuma ku a tudila ue tumbiji." 
Mark8:8 Anga enhoso a dia, ekuta. Ku ibhasu ia subhujuka anga a nona-ku sambuadi dia kinda." 
Mark8:9 Ene oso a di kua kambele ngo mu tenesa midi jiuana. Muene anga u a muanganesa. 
Mark8:10 Kithanganʼokio Jezú u di longa mu bote ni jixibulu je, anga u bhixila ku ixi ia Ndalamanuta." 
Mark8:11 Jifalizeu anga eza a kuata-nê jiphata. A bhindamena kuila u idikiza kisuma phala kulondekesa kuila o kutena kue kua tundu muene ku diulu, kua Nzambi." 
Mark8:12 Muene anga u di tula muenhu ni mukondo ua muẋima, uixi; Phala-hi o muiji uenhú ua bhindamena kisuma? Ngi tanga o kidi, kana-ku kisuma kia bhana ku muiji uenhú." 
Mark8:13 Anga u a xa, u di longa dingi mu bote, u zauka ku sambua." 
Mark8:14 Jixibulu a jimbi-ku o kuambata jimbolo; mu bote anga mu kala ngo imoxi. 
Mark8:15 Muene anga u kala mu ku a tendelela, uixi: Alukenu, mu dimukine o kithûthume kia jifalizeu ni kithûthume kia Helode." 
Mark8:16 Ene anga a kuata ku di fetela, exi: Muene ua mu zuela kiki, mukonda o jimbolo ki tuala na-ju." 
Mark8:17 Jezú kia kʼivu, uixi: Muala ku di fetela-hi, mukonda mua kambe jimbolo? Kífua kiluua muíʼvua? Kiluua muʼijiia? Hanji mua xiti mu thulu? Imʼiíi ki ia mi tetulukila luua?" 
Mark8:18 Mesu sai, ki mu mono? Matui sai, ki muʼivu? Ki mu lembalala?" 
Mark8:19 Ki nga uanena o mbolo jitanu, ku midi jitanu, ibhasu mua i nona ngalu jikuẋi? Exi: Kuinhi dia ngalu ni kiiadi." 
Mark8:20 O ki nga uanena sambuadi dia mbolo, ku midi jiuana, ibhasu mua i nona inda ikuẋi? Exi: Sambuadi." 
Mark8:21 Kuala Muene: Kífua mua tokoka ku kʼijiia? 
Mark8:22 Muene anga u bhixila ku Betesáida. Anga a mu bhekela kifuôfo, he a mu dionda ku mu kuata." 
Mark8:23 Muene u mu kuata mu lukuaku u mu endesa kate kia tundu mu sanzala. O kia mu ṗhamena tumathe mu mesu, u mu tula maku ku thandu, uixi: Ua mono kima?" 
Mark8:24 Muene ua kengelela, uixi: Nga mono athu, maji edi kala mixi iala mu kuenda." 
Mark8:25 Jezú anga u mu tula dingi o maku luamukuá ku thanduʼa mesu. O kifuôfo kia tonginina dingi, ueluka! Ima ioso ua mu i mona kia kiambote." 
Mark8:26 Anga u mu tuma kuia ku bhata dia, uixi: Kana kubokona dingi mu sanzala." 
Mark8:27 Kienhokio Jezú anga uenda ni jixibulu je kate ku jizanzala ja Sezaleia ia Filipe. Mu njila anga u ibhula jixibulu, uixi: Athu ala ku ngʼila kuma: Eme nanhi?" 
Mark8:28 Maxibulu a mu tangela, exi: Amoxi-mu a mu kuila exi Eie Nzuá dia Batizu; amoxi, Elija; amoxi exi, Muthu ku jipolofeta." 
Mark8:29 Muene ua ebhula: Enu-phe muixi, eme nanhi? Phetele uetaia, uixi: Eie Ngana, eie u Kristu!" 
Mark8:30 Muene anga u a tendelela kuma ka ki tange ku athu. 
Mark8:31 Anga u kuata ku a longa kuma o Monʼa Muthu u bhinga u bhita ku jiphaxi javulu; ni ku mu di tuna kuala adiakime a Jijudé, ni makota ma jinganga ni jimesene jene mu longa o Kitumu kia Nzambi. A-nda ku mu jibha, nʼa fukunuke mu kizuua kia katatu." 
Mark8:32 Jezú mu kuzuela, o hundu iíi, ua i lombolola muene kiambote. Phetele anga a mu ambata bhu mbandu, he u kuata ku mu bazela." 
Mark8:33 Muene-phe kia sakuka, u tala ku jixibulu, he u bazela Phatele, uixi: Ndé kunha, Satana! Mukonda eie kua suu ima ia Nzambi, ua suu ngo ima ia athu." 
Mark8:34 Bhenhobho Jezú anga u ixana o mundu, u a ambela kumoxi ni jixibulu je, uixi: Se muthu uambe kuiza ku dima diami, kikale u jimba ku di xinganeka muene, a zangule dikulusu die, nʼa ngi kaiele." 
Mark8:35 Kuma uoso uambe kubhulula o muenhu ue, ua-nda ku u texi. Maji uoso u texi o muenhu ue, mukonda diami eme ni dia Njimbu Iambote, uanda ku u bhulula." 
Mark8:36 O muthu u bhanduluka-hi, se ua nganhala oxi ioso, nʼa i texila o muenhu ue?" 
Mark8:37 Mba muthu u bhana muenhu ue mu kima kiahi? 
Mark8:38 Uoso u kala ni jisonhi jami eme ni ja maka mami ku muiji iu ua jiphanda ni ituxi, o Monʼa Muthu ue ua ka kala ni jisonhi ja muene kia keza ni ungana ua Tatʼâ ni ji-anju je jangene." 
Mark9:1 Anga ua ambela, uixi: Ngi mi ambela kidi, bhenhabha sai-bhu athu emana-bhu, ka ka lola kalunga kate kia ka mona o Utuminu ua Nzambi iu uiza ni kusina." 
Mark9:2 Kia bhiti izuua isamanu, Jezú u katula Phatele ni Tiiaku ni Nzuá, anga uia-nâ ku mulundu ua di leka, ubheka ua. Muene anga u kituluka bhu pholo ia." 
Mark9:3 O izuatu iê i benha ni kuzela kuavulu, kana musukudi mu ngongo u tena kuzelesa kiokio." 
Mark9:4 Maxibulu kitatuʼ iki a mono kua a tukulukila ni Elija ni Mozé, he a kala mu zuela ni Jezú." 
Mark9:5 Phetele anga u kumbulula, u ambela Jezú, uixi: Mesene kia uabha muene etu kukala kunu! Tu tunge-bhu fundu jitatu: Imoxi o iê, imoxi ia Mozé, imoxi ia Elija." 
Mark9:6 Kuma Phetele kʼejiia dingi kia zuela, mbata maxibulu ene oso a bhuuama ni uoma." 
Mark9:7 Anga kuiza dituta, dia a vungina ene oso; mu dituta anga mu tunda dízui, dʼixi: Muenhu Monʼami nga mu zola! Muene mu mu ívua." 
Mark9:8 Muʼanzanzʼomo, kia talesa, kana-bhu dingi muthu, Jezú ngo axala-nê." 
Mark9:9 O kia kala mu tuluka ku mulundu, muene ua a tendelela kuma ima ioso ia mono, ka i tangele muthu, kate muene kia ka fukunuka ku ʼalunga." 
Mark9:10 Ene, kizuelu kienhiki anga a ki lunda, ni kudibhudisa mudia mba kufukunuka ku ʼalunga kua lombolola kiebhi?" 
Mark9:11 Anga a mu ibhula, exi: O asoneki, ala kuila kiebhi kuma ki bhinga Elija u dianga kuiza?" 
Mark9:12 Kuala muene: Kidi kiene, Elija u dianga kuiza, he u bheka ima ioso mu uiukilu ue. Maji a ki soneka-phe kiebhi mu Mikanda ia Nzambi kuma Monʼa Muthu u tokala u bhita mu jiphaxi javulu, ni ku mu tobhesa?" 
Mark9:13 Nga mi ambela-phe kuma Elija uejile kia; maji ene a mu bhange ioso ia mesena, kala kia mu soneka mu Mikanda ia Nzambi." 
Mark9:14 O kieza bhua xedi o jixibulu, a sange kifuẋi kia dikota kia a bhongolokela, ni jimesene ja kulonga o Kitumu, a kuata-nâ jiphata." 
Mark9:15 Kithanganʼ okio kifuẋi kioso, kia mono Jezú, a sasumuka, anga a lenga ku mu menekena." 
Mark9:16 Muene ua ebhula, uixi: Mua kuata-nâ jiphata jahi?" 
Mark9:17 Kuala muthu mu kifuẋi, uixi: Mesene, nga ku bhekela monʼami, u mu tale. Uala ni nzumbi ia dibubu, ka tena kuzuela." 
Mark9:18 Bhuoso-phe bhu i mu kuatela i mu vunda bhoxi, u thuthuma kifulu, u kokota ku mazu; muthu iu bhele ngohʼú! Jixibulu je nga zuela-nâ kuila a i tundise, ene-phe ka tena." 
Mark9:19 Muene u a kumbulula, uixi: Enu tata! Muiji ua kambe o kuxikana, tu kalaʼdi kate bhebhi? Kate bhebhi, ki ngi mi lendukila? Ngi bhekele-nê kunu." 
Mark9:20 Anga eza-nê. O nzumbi iaiibha ki ia zubha kumona Jezú, kithanganʼokio i mu sakesa kiaiibha, u di vunda bhoxi, he u mbolomoka ni kuthuthuma kifulu." 
Mark9:21 Anga u ibhula tata, uixi: Hanji monʼe ki kia mu mu bhita kiki, thembu ia vulu kia? Uixi: Tunde undenge." 
Mark9:22 Sai luavulu i mu vubula mu tubhia, mba mu menha, phala ku mu jibha. Eie-phe, Ngana, se u tena kubhanga kima, tu kuatele henda, u tu kudile." 
Mark9:23 Kuala Jezú: Eie se u tena kuxikana! Kuma ima ioso i xikina kua io ua xikana. 
Mark9:24 Kithanganʼokio, o tata uavu monʼe u di kola, uixi: Nga xikana, Ngana! Ngi kuatekese mu kukamba kuxikana kuami!" 
Mark9:25 Jezú kia mono bhuala ku di bhongolola mundu, u kidika o nzumbi iabolo, uixi: Eie u nzumbi ia dibubu, ni uxilu, nga ku tumu: Tunda mu mukutu ua mona iu, nuka dingi u mu bokona!" 
Mark9:26 O ki ia zubha ku di kola, ni ku mu sanhesa kiavulu, ia tundu. O monʼa diiala anga uila kala uafu; kate athu avulu ambele, exi: Uafu." 
Mark9:27 Jezú-phe u mu kuata mu lukuaku, u mu balumuna; o mona anga uimana." 
Mark9:28 O kia zubha kubokona mʼonzo, jixibulu ji mu ibhula bhu mbandu, exi: Etu-phe tua lembuela-hi ku i tundisa?" 
Mark9:29 Kuala muene: Mbutu iíi ia nzumbi, kana dingi ki i tundisa, kikale ngo mu kusamba ni kujila." 
Mark9:30 Kutunda bhenhobho Jezú ni maxibulu mê a bhita mu Ngalileia. Muene ka mesenene bhu kala muthu u kʼijiia kuila muene ueza. 
Mark9:31 Kuma u kala mu longa jixibulu je, uixi: Monʼa Muthu a-nda ku mu bhakula bhu maku ma athu, o ene a-nda ku mu jibha; o kia zubha ku mu jibha, kizuua kia katatu u fukunuka." 
Mark9:32 Ene-phe, hundu iíi ia a jinganena, o ku mu ibhula-iu ala ni uoma." 
Mark9:33 Jezú ni maxibulu mê anga a bhixila ku Kafanau. O kia zubha kubokona mʼonzo, muene uebhula o kuinhi dia xibulu ni kiiadi, uixi: Phata iahi i mua kuatele mu njila?" 
Mark9:34 Ene-phe a dixibha. Kuma ene mu njila a kuatele phata ia uoso u kala o dikota. 
Mark9:35 Jezú anga u xikama, u ixana o kuinhi ni kiiadi, uixi: Se muthu uandala u kala ku pholo, ki bhinga u sukidila ku dima, u kala ngamba ia akua." 
Mark9:36 Anga u katula kamona, u ka bheka bhu ʼaxaxe ka, anga u mu kuata mu maku, uixi:" 
Mark9:37 Uoso u tambulula kamona mukua ni kaka mu dijina diami, eme-muene ua ngi tambulula. O uoso-phe u ngi tambulula eme, ki eme ngo a ngi tambulula, maji ni Io ua ngi tumu." 
Mark9:38 Nzuá anga u mu ambela, uixi: Mesene, etu tua sangele muthu uala mu tundisa madimonho mu dijina die, etu anga tu mu kidika, mukonda ka tokala mu dianda dietu." 
Mark9:39 Kuala Jezú-phe: Kana ku mu kidika! Mukonda kana muthu u tena kubhanga kisuma mu dijina diami, kindala nʼa ngi lungulukila." 
Mark9:40 Kuma uoso ka tu zembe, ua tu bande." 
Mark9:41 Kuma uoso u mi bhana kunua kopho ia menha mukonda mua tokala Kristu, ngi mi ambela kidi, muenho ka kamba kisakidilu kiê." 
Mark9:42 Uoso ue ku tuana tutu tua ngi xikana, u bhangesa kamona kamoxi ku di bhala, ni ku ngi xisa eme, muthu io kia mu tokala o ku mu nhenga kiditadi kia kuhuhila mu xingu, ni ku mu bobesa mu ʼalunga." 
Mark9:43 Ni lukuaku lue, se lu ku bhangesa ku di bhala, batula-lu! Mbata kota o kubokona ku muenhu ki uábua u kinema, kana o kukala ni maku maiadi anga uia-nâ mu ifernu, mu tubhia ki tuene dingi kujima. [" 
Mark9:44 Mua bhingi dibhuka die ki di fu, o tubhia tuê ki tu xikina kujima.]" 
Mark9:45 Ni kinama kiê se kia ku bhangesa ku di bhala, batula-kiu! Kuma ujitu ue kota o kubokona ku muenhu ki uábhua u kinema, kana o kukala ni inama iiadi anga uia-na-iu mu ifernu; [" 
Mark9:46 Mua bhingi o dibhuka die ki di fu, o tubhia tuê ki tu xikina kujima.]" 
Mark9:47 Ni diesu die se di ku bhangesa ku di bhala, lokola-diu! Mukonda ujitu ue kota o kubokona mu Utminu ua Nzambi u mukua diesu dimoxi, kana o kukala ni mesu maiadi, kuia-nâ mu ifernu." 
Mark9:48 Mua bhingi dibhuka die ki di fu, o tubhia tuê ki tu xikina kujima." 
Mark9:49 Mukonda muthu uoso a ka mu tôua ni tubhia. 
Mark9:50 Môngua ua di uabhela kiua! Môngua-phe se uabhu o kutouala kue, uene a u toua-hi? Kalenu ni môngua moxi dienu, mu kale ku paze ni ku di tuma mudienu." 
Mark10:1 Kubalumuka bhenhobho, Jezú uiza bhu mbambe ia Judeia, ku sambua dia Njoloda; ifuẋi anga i mu bhongolokela dingi; muene anga u kala mu longa kala ki ene o kífua kiê." 
Mark10:1 Kubalumuka bhenhobho, Jezú uiza bhu mbambe ia Judeia, ku sambua dia Njoloda; ifuẋi anga i mu bhongolokela dingi; muene anga u kala mu longa kala ki ene o kífua kiê." 
Mark10:2 Anga kuiza Jifalizeu, ji mu ibhula phala ku mu londa, exi: Diiala se u senga muhatuʼê, kala kiala mu Kitumu kietu, u lunga?" 
Mark10:3 Muene ua a kumbulula uixi: Mozé ua mi tumu kiebhi? 
Mark10:4 Exi: Mozé uehela o ku mu bhangela mukanda ua lubongo, ni ku mu senga." 
Mark10:5 Kuala Jezú-phe: Mukonda dia kukola kua miẋima ienu, kiene Mozé kia mi sonekena o kijilʼiki." 
Mark10:6 Tunde-phe ku dimatekenu dia kubhanga ima ioso, a ki zuela kuila: Nzambi ua a bhange ndumbe ni mukaji." 
Mark10:7 Kienhiki ki bhangesa diiala di xa tatʼâ ni mamʼa, he u di kuatenena kua mukajiʼê," 
Mark10:8 ene kiiadi kia anga a kala xitu imoxi ngo. Uila kiki, kala dingi kiiadi, maji xitu imoxi kia." 
Mark10:9 Kioso-phe kia bandeka Nzambi, ki bhu kale muthu u ki uanununa." 
Mark10:10 Kutula mʼonzo jixibubulu ji mu kumuna dingi o makʼama. 
Mark10:11 Muene iu ua ambela, uixi: Diiala uoso u senga mukajiʼê nʼa sakana uengi, ua te phanda." 
Mark10:12 O muhatu ue, se u senga munumiʼê, nʼa sakana uengi, ua te phanda." 
Mark10:13 Anga amoxi-mu a kala ku mu bhekela tuana tua ndenge, phala a tu tule maku mê ku thandu; maji jixibulu je anga a bazela oso eza na-tu, a a fudisa." 
Mark10:14 Jezú-phe kia ki mono, kia mu iibhila kiavulu, uixi: Ehelenu o tuana ku ngi bhixila! Kana ku tu kaia, kuma o Utuminu ua Nzambi ua tokala oso a soko ni tuana enhá." 
Mark10:15 Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela: Uoso u kamba kutambulula o Utuminu ua Nzambi kala kamona ka ndenge, uene ka ka u bokona." 
Mark10:16 Anga u tu tambula bhu jihata je, u ta maku mê ku thandu dia, he u tu benzela." 
Mark10:17 Mu kutunda bhenhobho, kutula mu njila, kuiza muthu ni kulenga u mu fukamena, he u mu ibhula, uixi: Mesene ia mbote, eme ngi bhanga kiebhi, phala ngi lundule o muenhu ki uàbhua?" 
Mark10:18 Jezú ua mu ambela, uixi: Eie u ngʼila kiebhi iambote? Sai ngo umoxi uala mbote, muene Nzambi." 
Mark10:19 O ijila ua ijiia? Kana kujibha, Kana ku ta phànda; Kana kunhana, Kana kubhana umbangi ua makutu. Kana kufumba, Tatʼenu ni mamʼenu a bhane ujitu." 
Mark10:20 Kuala munzangala: Mesene, ima ioso iíi, nga i kumbidila tunde undenge." 
Mark10:21 Jezú ua muʼixi sui, ua mu zolo. Anga u mu ambela, uixi: Eie kima kimoxi ngo kia ku kambe-ku: Ndé, ka sumbise ioso i uavu, o kitadi u ki uanene jingadiama, mbe u kale ni jimbongo ku diulu; nda uize kiua, u ngi kaiele." 
Mark10:22 O munzangala anga u sonoka pholo ki evu o hundu iíi, anga u tunda-bhu ni mukondo, kuma mukua jimbongo javulu." 
Mark10:23 Jezú-phe, sui dingi ku jixibulu je ja mu kondoloka, uixi: Kubhonza kuahi, akua itadi o kubokona mu Utuminu na Nzambi!" 
Mark10:24 Jixibulu anga a diuana o maka mê. Jezú-phe ua kumuna dingi, uixi: Ana, kubhonza kuahi, oso a di fiiala jimbongo, o kubokona mu Utuminu ua Nzambi!" 
Mark10:25 Inda o kamelu kubhita bhu dizungu dia nguia, ki ki bhonzo kala kia mukua itadi kubokona mu Utuminu ua Nzambi." 
Mark10:26 Ene anga a sasumuka kiavulu, a kala mu dʼibhudisa mudia, exi: Uebhi-phe u bhuluka?" 
Mark10:27 Sui kuala Jezú, uixi: Ku athu ki kamba ku xikina, kua Nzambi phe kana. Kuma kua Nzambi iene ioso i xikina." 
Mark10:28 Phetele anga u kuata kuzuela, uixi: Talesa! Etu tua xisa ioso etu tua ku kaiela." 
Mark10:29 Kuala Jezú: Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela: Kana muthu u xa dibhata, mba jiphange, ja mala ni ja ahatu, mba mama, mba tata, mba ana, mba jixi, mukonda diami eme ni dia Njimbu Iambote," 
Mark10:30 he u kamba kutambula luhama ku muenhu iu, mabhata, jiphange, ja mala ni ja ahatu, jimama, ana, jixi, kumoxi ni jiphaxi ja ku mu zuididika. Maji o ku mundu ua keza-ku, muenhu ki uábhua." 
Mark10:31 Sai-phe kindala a dianga, a ka sukidila; sai a sukidila kindala, a ka dianga." 
Mark10:32 Anga a kala mu njila mu kubanda ku Jeluzaleme. Jezú anga u tuamenena, o maxibulu ia a kaiela ku dima. Maxibulu anga a diuana, o ene oso a mu nhenganana a kala ni uoma. Muene anga u di bunda dingi ni kuinhi ni kiiadi, u kuata ku a tangela ima ia-nda ku mu bhita, uixi:" 
Mark10:33 Talesenu, etu tu bandʼú ku Jeluzaleme, o kuenhoko, Monʼa Muthu a-nda ku mu bhakula ku makota ma jinganga ni ku jimesene ja Kitumu. Ene a-nda ku mu elesa phala ku mu jibha, anda ku mu bhakuila akua matumbu." 
Mark10:34 Ene a mu bhanga kasekelu, a mu ta mathe, a mu beta ni jixikote, he a mu jibha. Maji ki bhita izuua itatu-phe, ua ka fukunuka." 
Mark10:35 Kienhokio Tiiaku ni Nzuá, anʼa Zebedeu, anga a mu zukama, exi: Mesene, tua mesena u tu bhanga kioso ki tu ku bhinga." 
Mark10:36 Kuala Jezú: Mua mesena ngi mi bhanga kiebhi? 
Mark10:37 Exi: U tu bhesa kuma iú u xikama ku mbandu iê ia kadilu, o iu ku kiasu, kioso hinu ki u xikama ku Kiandu kia Ungana ue." 
Mark10:38 Kuala Jezú: Enu ki mua kʼijiia ngo kioso ki mua bhingi. Kífua mu tena kunua dikáu di ngi nua eme? Ni kutambula o batizu ia ngi batizala na-iu Eme? 
Mark10:39 Exi: Tua soko-bho. Kuala Jezú: Kidi! Dikáu di ngi nua eme, mu di nua muene; a mi bhitisa ue o batizu ia ngi batizala eme." 
Mark10:40 Maji o kuxikama ku madilu mami-phe, ni ku kiasu, ki kiami eme o ku ki bhana, maji kiangene kia Nzambi, kua io oso a a lekelelà-kiu." 
Mark10:41 O dikuinhi kia zubha ku kʼívua, a sota kufutulukila Tiiaku ni Nzuá." 
Mark10:42 Jezú anga ua exana ene oso, uixi: Enu mua kʼijiia kuma a di fika ungana mu akuajixi a bhikisa o mundu; o makota ma a tumina." 
Mark10:43 Mudienu-phe, ki ki kale kiki. Uoso-phe mudienu uendi ukota, a kale ngamba ienu;" 
Mark10:44 O uoso uendi o ku kala ku pholo, a kale mubhika ua ene oso." 
Mark10:45 Kuma ni Monʼa Muthu ue, keza kukala ni athu a mu bhikila, maji muene-ku kubhikila ni kubhana o muenhu ue mu ku kula mundu." 
Mark10:46 Jezú ni maxibulu mê he a bhixila mu sanzala ia Jelikó. O mu kutunda mu Jelikó, ni muene, ni jixibulu je, ni kifuẋi kia dikota, bhu kala kifofo Bartimeu, monʼa Timeu ua xikama bhu mbanduʼa ikoka mu bhinga jimola." 
Mark10:47 O ki evu kuila muene Jezú dia Nzalé ua-lu bhita, u kuata ku di kola, uixi: Jezú, u Monʼa Davidi, ngi kuatele henda!" 
Mark10:48 Mundu anga a mu bazela, phala a di xibhe. Muene-phe u suína dingi kiavulu ni ku di kola, uixi: U Monʼa Davidi, ngi kuatele henda!" 
Mark10:49 Jezú anga uimana, uixi: Mu ixanienu. Anga exana o kifofo, exi: Ua lungu-é! Balumuka, iu ku ixana!" 
Mark10:50 Muene kia takula o kizuatu kiê ku dima, uixi: Petéka! Uiza kua Jezú." 
Mark10:51 Jezú iu ua mu kumbulula, uixi: Ua mesena ngi ku bhanga kiebhi? Kuala o kifofo: Mesene, ngi bhane dingi o kumona." 
Mark10:52 Jezú anga u mu ambela, uixi: Nda-ié! O kuxikana kue kua ku bhana kuiluka. Kithanganʼokio Bartimeu anga u iluka o mesu, he mona dingi, anga u kaiela Jezú mu njila." 
Mark11:1 Jezú ni maxibuluʼê kia zukama ku Jeluzaleme, a bhixila ku Mulundu ua Midiva, bha lulama ni jisanzala ja Betefaje ni Betanha. Bhenhobho muene u tuma jixibulu jiiadi, uixi:" 
Mark11:2 Ndenu ku sanzala ia mi lulama bhabha. Kithangana ki mua tula, mua ka sanga monʼa bulu, iòkuike, kiluua muthu u i mondala; mu i jituna, mu ize na-iu bhabha." 
Mark11:3 He bhu kala muthu u mʼila kuila: Mua-lu bhanga-hi? Mua kela: Ngana ua i bhindamena. Muene kindala u i tumikisé. 
Mark11:4 Anga aia, a sanga o kabulu a ka kuikila bhu mbanduʼ a muelu bhu kanga; anga a ka jituna." 
Mark11:5 Ku athu emana-bhu, amoxi, exi: Muala kubhanga-hi? Mu jituina-hi o kabulu?" 
Mark11:6 Anga a kumbulula kala kia a longesa Jezú, ene anga a ehela." 
Mark11:7 O kabulu anga eza na-ku kua Jezú, a ka zuika izuatu ia, muene anga u ka mondala." 
Mark11:8 Bhu kala athu avulu a mu zalela izuatu ia mu njila; amukuá a zala isasa ia su mu mukau. 
Mark11:9 Ni ia a mu tuamenena, ni ia a mu kaiela, a di kola, exi: Hozana kua Nzambi! Tana-ku, ueza mu dijina dia Ngana!" 
Mark11:10 Tanesenu o usobha ueza-ku, usobha ua tatʼ etu Davidi! Hozana kua Nzambi ku maúlu!" 
Mark11:11 Jezú anga u bokona mu Jeluzaleme, kate mu Tembulu; o kia zubha ku talesa-mu ima ioso, kuma ngoloxi kia, u tunda ni kuinhi ni kiiadi, uia ku Betanha." 
Mark11:12 Kukia ni kimene, mu kutunda ku Betanha, nzala i mu kuata." 
Mark11:13 O kia mono mufiku mu kanga, uala ni ifuakasa, u bhixila, sumba u bonga-ku tufiku. Kia u bhiẋila-phe, u sanga ifuakasa ngo iala-ku, kuma ki iene o thembu ia jifiku." 
Mark11:14 Muene anga uambela o muxi, uixi: Ki bhuà kale dingi muthu udia kubundu ko kue. Jixibulu anga a kʼívua." 
Mark11:15 Kioso Jezú ni maxibuluʼê kia bhixila mu Jeluzaleme, muene u bokona mu Tembulu, he u kuata kukaiese-mu oso a sumba mba a sumbisa mu Tembulu, anga u lundula o meza ma akua kutolokala kitadi, ni ibhuna ia abadi a tadika membe." 
Mark11:16 Kehela muthu kubhita mu Tembulu ni kitutu kiosokioso. 
Mark11:17 Muene anga u kala mu kulonga enhoso, uixi: Ka ki soneka mu Mikanda Ikola kia tange Nzambi kuma: Inzo, iami, a ixana inzo ia kusambela, ia akua jixi joso? Enu-phe mua i kitula ngenda ia kusuamena míii!" 
Mark11:18 O makota ma jinganga ni jimesene ja kulonga o Kitumu a kʼívua, anga a kala mu ku mu kanena kioso kia mu jibha, mukonda a mu kuatela uoma, mbata o mundu uoso a mu diuana ulongelu ue." 
Mark11:19 Kutula mu ngoloxi, Jezú ni maxibuluʼê a tunda mu mbonge." 
Mark11:20 O ki kuakie kia kala mu kubhita mu kimene, a mona mufiku ua lela kate ku jindanji." 
Mark11:21 Phetele kia ki tukumuka, uixi: Mesene, talesa o mufiku u ua te mázui, ua lela." 
Mark11:22 Jezú ua a kumbulula, uixi: Xikanenu Nzambi." 
Mark11:23 Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela: Uoso ua kela mulundu iu: Zangumuka bhabha, ua ka di vike mu ʼalunga, o ku muẋima ka te-ku phata, maji u xikana kuma kioso kia tange ki bhata, ki mu bhita muene." 
Mark11:24 Uila kiki ngi mi ambela: Ioso ima i mu bhinga mu kusamba, xikanenu kuma mu i tambula, anga mu i tambula muene." 
Mark11:25 O ki mu kala mu kuimana ni kusamba, se kuala muthu mua mu kala ni phonzo, mu lolokiene, phala o Tatʼenu uala mu diulu a mi loloke ue ikuma ienu. [" 
Mark11:26 Kuma se mu kamba kuloloka akuenu, Tatʼenu uala mu diulu u kamba ue ku mi loloka o ikuma ienu.]" 
Mark11:27 Anga a bhixila dingi mu Jeluza leme. O muene kia kala mu jeta mu Tembulu, makota ma jinganga ni asoneki ni adiakime ku Jijude eza kua Jezú;" 
Mark11:28 anga a mu ambela, exi: Ungana uahi u uala na-u, phala kubhanga ima iíi? Ungana iú nanhi ua ku bhana-u ua kubhanga imʼii?" 
Mark11:29 Kuala Jezú: Eme uami ngi mʼibhula ue kima kimoxi, mu ngi vutuile, anga ngi mi tangela kiua uoso ungana u ngala na-u phala kubhanga imʼiíi." 
Mark11:30 O batizu ia Nzuá ia tundile ku diulu kua Nzambi, inga ku athu? Ngi vutuidienu." 
Mark11:31 Ene a banza ni muẋima, exi: O ki tuila: Ku diulu kua Nzambi; muene ua-nda kuila: ene-phe Nzuá mua kambela-hi ku mu xikana?" 
Mark11:32 O ki tuila: Ku athu, (o mundu a-nda ku tu lungulukila kuma ene oso a xikana kidi kuila o Nzuá polofeta, o batizu iê ki i tena kutunda ku athu)." 
Mark11:33 Anga a vutuila Jezú, exi: Manhí kiá! Ki tua kʼijiia. Kuala Jezú: Eme uami, ki ngi mi tangela uoso ungana u ngala na-u, phala kubhanga imʼiíi." 
Mark12:1 Anga Jezú u kuata ku a tela ifika, uixi: Kukala muthu u dimisa mulenga ue ua mivide, u u xita kikonzo, u kanda ditangi dia ku kamena vinhu, he u tunga kithungu kia di leka phala dikengelelu dia ku talesa ioso mu dibhia, anga u u lukalesa ku jingunza, muene uia kuengi mu uenji." 
Mark12:2 Ku tula bhu thembu ia tokala kubhongolola idima, u tuma mubhika ku jingunza, phala kutambula-ku ibundu ia mulenga." 
Mark12:3 Jingunza anga ji mu kuata, ji mu beta, he ji mu kaia maku ma hatu." 
Mark12:4 Anga u tuma-ku mubhika uamukuá. Muene ue anga a mu kuama mu mutue, a mu bhanga ufusa, a mu lebhula." 
Mark12:5 Anga u tuma dingi mukua. Maji o muenhu idimakaji ia mu jibha. Ni akua dingi avulu: Iá, a a beta, ia a a jibha." 
Mark12:6 O mukua mulenga-phe kua mu xala kia ngoho monʼe a mu zola. Ne kienhókio, ku pholo kunu, anga u mu tuma muene, uixi: Nga ki xikana, kuila Monʼami a mu xila." 
Mark12:7 Maji o jingunza jenhiji-phe ji di longesa, exi: Iú muène kabhingano! Ndokuenu, tu mu jibhe, undundu ue tu mu buê-u!" 
Mark12:8 Anga a mu kuata, a mu jibha, a mu tubhula mu kikonzo, a mu texi." 
Mark12:9 Ngana, uavu o mulenga ue, ua-nda kubhanga kiebhi? Hinu uiza, u jibha o jingunzʼojo, o mulenga he u u lukalesa athu engi." 
Mark12:10 Enu kiluua mu tanga makʼama, mòsoneke mu Mikanda Ikola, kuila: O ditadi dia di tunu jimesene, diene dia kuatesa bhu thungi;" 
Mark12:11 dienhidi dia tundu kua Ngana, ku mesu metu-phe dia di bhange kisuma!" 
Mark12:12 Ene anga a sota ku mu kuata, maji a kala ni uoma ua mundu; kuma a mono o kifikʼiki ua a tela-kiu ene; anga a mu xa, a tunda-bhu." 
Mark12:13 Ene anga a katula athu ku jifalizeu ni ku akua Helode, phala ku mu kuata ku maka." 
Mark12:14 O kia zubha kutula, exi: Mesene, etu tua kuijiia kuila u mukua kidi, ku lenge muthu uoso-uoso. Mukonda eie ku suu jipholo ja athu, u longa kidi o njila ia Nzambi. O kiki tu tangele hanji: Tua tokala kubhana lubhaku lua Sézalu, inga kana? Tu lu bhana, inga ki tu lu bhana?" 
Mark12:15 Muène-phe kuma uejiia o makutuʼa, uixi: Mu ngi bhombela-hi, phala ku ngi kuata mu kizuelu kiami eme-muène? Ngi tambuisienu denádia, ngi di mone." 
Mark12:16 Anga a mu tambuisa-diu. Ua ambela, uixi: O kídifua kiki, ni kidimbu kiê, kia nanhi? Exi: Kia Sézalu." 
Mark12:17 Bhenhobho Jezú ua ambela: Bhanenu-phe Sézalu, kia tokala Sézalu; Nzambi, kia tokala Nzambi. Anga a diuana kiavulu uvutuilu ue." 
Mark12:18 Kua mu kane dingi o jisaduseu, akua kuila ki kuene kufukunuka; a mu ibhula, exi:" 
Mark12:19 Mesene, Mozé ua tu sonekena kijila kuma, diiala se di kala ni phangʼiê uafu, iu uaxi muhatuʼê, maji kaxi mona, phangʼiê ia diiala a sakane muhatuʼê, mbe a sokolole o mbutu ia kota die." 
Mark12:20 Kua kexile-phe sambuadi dia mala, anʼa kamama. O dikota anga u sakana muhatuʼê, o ki a fu, ka xi mona." 
Mark12:21 Kiubha kiê anga u mu lundula, ufua, ka xi mona; o kiubhata ue kiòmuene." 
Mark12:22 Sambuadi dioso dia sakana-nê, maji kana muthu ua-xê mona. Ene oso kia zubha kufua, o muhatu ue uafu." 
Mark12:23 Ku difukunukinu-phe muenhu ua kala mukajiʼa nanhi? Kuma sambuadi dioso dia mu sakana! 
Mark12:24 Jezú ua ambela, uixi: Mua tondala kiavulu! Kia mi tondalesa ki kienhiki? Muedi o Madivulu Akôla òsoneke ki mua ejiia, ni kutena kua Nzambi ki mua kuijiia." 
Mark12:25 Mukonda kioso kia ka fukunuka o madifundu, ki kua kala dingi kusakana, mba kusakanesa. Athu a kala-phe mukua ni ji-anju mu diulu." 
Mark12:26 O kia madifundu-phe mba a fukunuka, enu kiluua mu tanga mu divulu dia Mozé? Sai bhuala o maka ma Kisasa, kia mu ambela Nzambi, uixi: Eme ngi Nzambi ia Mbalahamu, Nzambi ia Izake, Nzambi ia Jakobo." 
Mark12:27 Mu kuzuela kiki-phe, muene uambe kuila ki Nzambi ia madifundu, maji ia athu a muenhu. Enu mua tondala muene kiavulu!" 
Mark12:28 Mesene imoxi ia Kitumu ua zuka-mene-bhu, kia zubha kuívua jiphata ja kuatele, ni kia mono kuma muene ua a vutuila kiambote, ua mu ibhula, uixi: Ku ijila ioso, kiebhi o kijila kia dianga?" 
Mark12:29 Jezú ua vutula, uixi: Kijila kia dianga kiki: Ivua, u Izalaiele! Ngana Nzambi ietu, muene Ngana imoxi ngo." 
Mark12:30 Ngana-phe, Nzambi iê, u mu zola ni muẋima ue uoso, ni muenhu ue uoso, ni kilunji kiê kioso, ni nguzu iê ioso." 
Mark12:31 Okia kaiadi kiki: Mukuenu u mu zola, kala ki ua di zola eie-muene. Kana-ku dingi kijila kia tundu iiadíʼ ii." 
Mark12:32 Kuala o mesene ia Kitumu, kidi kiene, Mesene! Eie ua tange kiambote kuila Nzambi iala ngo imoxi, ki kuene dingi mukua." 
Mark12:33 O ku mu zola ni muẋima uoso, ni kilunji kioso, ni nguzu ioso, ni kuzola mukuetu kala ki tua di zolo etuʼene, kotʼelele, o jisata joso ja ibhaku ia kuoha ni maujitu engi a kubhakuila Nzambi, ndenge." 
Mark12:34 Jezú kia mono kuma o mesene ia Kitumu ua kumbulula ni kilunji, uixi: Eie o Utuminu ua Diulu ki ua ku kala dikanga. Tunde kienhiki, kana dingi muthu ua bhumine kukuata-nê phata." 
Mark12:35 Jezú anga u kumbulula kia kala mu longa mu Tembulu, uixi: O jimesene ja Kitumu ene mu longa kiebhi kuma Kristu monʼa Davidi?" 
Mark12:36 Se o Davidi muene, kia mu funhisa o Nzumbi Ikola, ua soneka uixi: Ngana u ambela Ngana iami; Xikama ku madilu mami, kate ki ngi ku bhanga o jinguma ji kala bangu iê ia inama." 
Mark12:37 Davidi muene se ua mu edi Ngana, u kala-phe kiebhi monʼe? O mundu ua dikota anga a mu ivua ni ngalasa, o ima ioso ia kexi mu longa." 
Mark12:38 Mu kulonga kue, uixi: Dimukinenu o jimesene ja kulonga Kitumu, endi o kukembela mu izuatu ia lebha ni kutambula maumenekenu bhu itanda mu nzunga," 
Mark12:39 Ni kusola o ibhuna ia jingana mu malombe, ni ididi ia ukota ku jifesa." 
Mark12:40 Ene a dia mabhata ma ngene ma atudi, anga a sueka o mangonha ma mu kusamba kuavulu. Enhá, o kaxtiku ka ka kala ka dikota." 
Mark12:41 Jezú anga u xikama bha lulama ni bhu dizaku. He u kala mu talesa o mundu ki ala kuta kitadi mu dizaku. Anga kukala ni jimvuama javulu, atamu ndumba dia kitadi." 
Mark12:42 Anga kuiza mutudi uala ngadiama, u ta-mu tumila-mbongo tuiadi tu bhanga ngo kíphaka." 
Mark12:43 Muene anga uixana jixibulu je, uixi: Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela: Kota kia te-mu o muhatu iu, mutudi ua ngadiama, ene oso ndenge, a te kitadi mu dizaku." 
Mark12:44 Kuma ene oso a katula ngo ku kiki kia subhuka ku nzungule; muene-phe, mu uadiama ue, ka mono dingi bhua nomona, iu ua te-mu o huta iê ioso." 
Mark13:1 Jezú kia kala mu kutunda mu Tembulu, xibulu iê imoxi i mu ambela, uixi: Mesene, talesa o matadi kia ma kalakala, ni jinzu ki jala! Kutunga kuahi ngo!" 
Mark13:2 Jezú ua mu ambela, uixi: Jinzo ua ji mono ja makota, kuambe? Bhenhabha-phe kana ditadi hinu dia ka xala-bhu, dia di lundama hanji kua mukua, ni di a kamba ku di lundumuna!" 
Mark13:3 O kia xikama ku Mulundu ua Midiva bhua lulama ni bhu Tembulu, Jezú u kala mu kengelela o Tembulu. Phetele ni Tiiaku ni Nzuá ni Mandele, a mu ibhula bhu mbandu, exi:" 
Mark13:4 Tu tangele o thembu kia ka bhita imʼiíi. O Kijimbuete kiê kiahi, kuila ima ioso iíi a-nda ku i kumbidila kia?" 
Mark13:5 Jezú anga u kuata ku a zuelela, uixi: Alukenu, kana muthu a mi jimbidise." 
Mark13:6 Sai athu avulu, a keza mu dijina diami, exi: Emʼiú ngi Kristu! A ka bhomba athu avulu." 
Mark13:7 O ki mu ívua ita ni minumango ia ita, ki mu ki tukumuke, mukonda imʼiíi i bhinga i dianga kubhita, o dizubhilu-phe kiluua." 
Mark13:8 Kuma kifuẋʼiki, kia ka lua ni kifuẋi kia mukua; kilômboʼiki kia ka lua ni kilombo kia mukua. Ku kala kinuminu kia bhoxi ki tungutisa mikau iavulu; kukala ue jinzala mu jixi. Imʼiíi-phe diandekelu ngo dia misusu, kala ia iu uala ku isènda." 
Mark13:9 Enu-phe di langienu! Kuma a ka mi kuta ni ku mi thelekala bhu kionge phala ku mi fundisa, a ka mi beta mu malombe. Mukonda diami a ka mi bheka bhu pholo ia jinguvulu ni enexi, enu he mua ka a tudila o Njimbu Iambote, mu ku a bhana umbangi." 
Mark13:10 Mukonda ki bhinga o Njimbu Iambote a dianga ku i boka ni ku i sanhalesa ku akua jixi joso. 
Mark13:11 O kia mi kuta he a kala ku mi bheka mu ku mi bhakula, ki mu kale ni hele kioso ki mua-nda kuzuela; kioso Nzambi kia ka mi bhana kithangana kienhókio, kiene ki mu zuela; kuma ki enu dingi mu zuela, maji o Nzumbi Ikola." 
Mark13:12 Muthu ua ka bhakula phangʼiê, phala ku mu jibha; o tata u bhakula mona; o ana a ka kitukila adiʼâ nʼa jibhisa." 
Mark13:13 A ka mi zemba kuala athu oso, mukonda dia dijina diami. Maji uoso-phe u kolokota kate bhu dizubhilu, muene u bhuluka." 
Mark13:14 Jezú anga u zuela dingi, uixi: Ki mu mona-phe o kisunji ki buikisa mundu kiemana bhuma ki kia tokala kukala-bhu, (uoso mutangi u tanga, a tongolole). Kienhókio, oso a kala mu Judeia, a ka lengele ku milundu." 
Mark13:14 Jezú anga u zuela dingi, uixi: Ki mu mona-phe o kisunji ki buikisa mundu kiemana bhuma ki kia tokala kukala-bhu, (uoso mutangi u tanga, a tongolole). Kienhókio, oso a kala mu Judeia, a ka lengele ku milundu." 
Mark13:15 O uoso uala ku thandu dia ʼnzo iê, a lenge lusolo, ka tulukile dingi o kubokona mʼonzo nʼa katule-mu kimbamba." 
Mark13:16 O uala kia ku mukau, kʼalukile dingi ku bhata mu kutakana o izuatu iê." 
Mark13:17 Lamba dia ahatu ió-phe oso a ka kala ni mavumu, mba a kala mu kuamuisa mu izuuʼomo!" 
Mark13:18 Sambenu kua Nzambi, phala ki ki bhite bhu thembu ia mbambi." 
Mark13:19 Kuma izuuʼoio kua kala divuua dia dikota, kiluua ngo di kala-ku tunde ku dimatekenu dia Nzambi kukalakala ima ioso kate lelu; ne ku hadia ki di moneka luiadi!" 
Mark13:20 Ngana se ua kambele kufikisa izuuʼ oio, kana xitu ieji kubhuluka. Maji mukonda-phe dia athuʼê angene a Nzambi, a solo muene phala ku a bhulula, izuua ienhoio a i fikisa kia." 
Mark13:21 Kienhókio se ku kala muthu u ku ambela, uixi: Talesa, Kristu iú kunu! Mba: Tala, Kristu iú koko! Ku ki xikane." 
Mark13:22 Mukonda kua ka tukuluka ji-Kristu ja makutu, ni jipolofeta ja makutu, a kèdikiza isuma ni madiuanu, phala a tàmbe kate ni anʼ angene a solo Nzambi, se ki xikina ku ki bhanga." 
Mark13:23 Enu-phe di langienu! Talesenu, Eme nga kalanga ku mi tangela ima ioso, kiosuʼiki kiluua i bhita." 
Mark13:24 Mu izuuʼomo-phe, kutunda ku divuuʼodio, dikumbi dia ka fulamana, o mbeji ia ka kamba kumuika." 
Mark13:25 O jithéthembua ja ka lauka ku diulu, o jinguzu jala ku maúlu a ka ji tungutisa." 
Mark13:26 Kienhókio kiene kia ka mona o Monʼa Muthu iu uiza ku matuta ni kutena kuavulu ni ungana. 
Mark13:27 Muene ua ka tuma ji-anju je ni ji bhongolole athuʼê angene ku mbandu jiuana ku tunda o kitembu, tunde kua suku oʼxi kate kua suku o diulu." 
Mark13:28 Ku mufiku-phe di longienu-ku kifika kiê: Luthangu lue ki lu di bhanga kia kindemvuna he lu buingita isasa, mua kʼijiia kuma mvula ia zukama." 
Mark13:29 Kiene ue enu, ki mua ka mona imʼiíi íi bhita, ijiienu-kiu kuma muene ua zukama, uala kia bhu muelu." 
Mark13:30 Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela: Muiji iú ki u buila, kate kia ka bhita ima ioso iíi." 
Mark13:31 O diulu ni oxi hinu i buila; o maka mami-phe ki ma ka buila. 
Mark13:32 Jezú anga u lombolola dingi, uixi: Kizuuʼokio-phe ni kithangana kiê, kana muthu ua kʼijiia, ne ji-anju mu diulu, ne o Mona, ki kale Tata muene ngo." 
Mark13:33 Alukenu-phe, mu langidile, mu sambe; kuma o thembu ki mua ijiia." 
Mark13:34 Kia kela mukua ni muthu uaii mu uenji, kʼoxi iengi, u xa dibhata die, u lekela akua mbele, he u a uanena kala muthu ni kikalakalu kiê, o mukua muelu he u mu tuma o kulangidila." 
Mark13:35 Langidilenu-phe! Kuma kithangana kioso hinu kʼiza ngana ia dibhata, ki mua kijiia, mba ku kièmba mba mukaẋi ka usuku, mba mu makolombolo, mba mu kimene;" 
Mark13:36 phala ki ki bhite kuila sumba uiza ku mbulu nʼa mi sange muaienu ku kilu! 
Mark13:37 Kioso ki nga mi tangela enu, ene oso nga a tangelakiu: Di langienu!" 
Mark14:1 Kiki kuila kua kambe izuua iiadi mu fesa ia Phasu, o Fesa ia Jimbolo ji Kamba Kithûthume, jinganga ja makota ni asoneki anga a mu kanena kioso kia mu kuata ni ndunge phala ku mu jibha." 
Mark14:2 Exi-phe, mu Fesa kana, sumba ki bhangesa mvunda, mundu he a tu lungulukila." 
Mark14:3 O kia kala mu Betanha mʼonzo ia Ximá mukua dibhute, ua xikama mu kudia, kuiza muhatu uala ni thenda ia alabasa, ia maji ma dizumba, ma nardo ia kidi, ma te kitadi kiavulu. Anga u zukula o thenda, o maji u ma lunduluila ku mutue ua Jezú." 
Mark14:4 Bhu kala athu bhenhobho, a kuata kulongolola mudia, exi: Phala-hi o maji a ma texi ngo kienhiki?" 
Mark14:5 Hinu maji a ma sumbisa mu hama jitatu ja madenádia, anga o kitadi a ki uanena jingadiama. Anga a kuata kuzukutisa o muhatu." 
Mark14:6 Jezú-phe, uixi: Mu ehienu! Muhatu mu mu tatesela-hi? Ua ngi bhange kima kiambote." 
Mark14:7 Mbata jingadiama mua xalela-na-ju; kithangana kioso ki mua mesena ku a bhanga jimbote, mu ki bhanga. Eme-phe ki ngi xalela ni enu ithangana ioso." 
Mark14:8 Muhatu iú ua bhange kioso kia tena. Mukonda muene, kiosuʼiki kiluua ngi fua, ua kalanga ku ngi uaia ku mukutu maji ma ku ngi funda." 
Mark14:9 Kidi kiene-phe, ngi mi ambela: Kuoso-kuoso kua ka tula o Njimbu Iambote, mu ngongo ioso, ni kiki ue kia ngi bhange o muhatu iú, a ka ki tanga phala dilembalelu die." 
Mark14:10 Juda mukua Kadiota, muthu ua tokala ku kuinhi ni kiiadi, anga uia ku jinganga ja makota phala kuta-nâ o kikutu kia ku a thelekala Jezú." 
Mark14:11 Ene kia zubha ku kʼívua, a kala ni ngalasa iavulu, he a dia nguidi ia ku mu bhana kitadi. Juda muene anga u kala mu langa o thembu ioso iauabha ia ku mu bhakula." 
Mark14:12 Kutula mu kizuua kia dianga kia Fesa ia Jimbolo ji Kamba kithûthume, thembu o Jijudé iene kujibha o jimbudi phala kusata o Phasu, jixibulu je, exi: Kuebhi, Ngana, ku ua mesena ku tuia mu ku zalela, ku u dila o Phasu?" 
Mark14:13 Muene anga u tuma jixibulu jiiadi, uixi: Ndenu mu mbonge. O muenhomo mua ka takana ni muthu uambata disanga dia menha. Mu kaiedienu muene," 
Mark14:14 o mʼonzo muoso mua bokona, mua kʼambela mukua dibhata, muixi: Eme Mesene, uixi kiki: Sala iami iebhi, mu ngi dila o Phasu ni jixibulu jami?" 
Mark14:15 Muene-phe, ua ka mʼidikiza inzo ia thandu, iòzale kia. Enu mu tu iudikila ima ioso muenhomo." 
Mark14:16 O jixibulu jiiadiʼojo anga jiia, a bhixila mu mbonge, he a sanga ioso ia ambela muene. Ene anga a iudika o Phasu." 
Mark14:17 Kutula mu ngoloxi, Jezú muene ueza ni kuinhi ni kiiadi." 
Mark14:18 O kia xikama ku meza, a kala mu kudia, Jezú uixi: Kidi kiene ngi mi ambela, sai muthu mudienu, ngala kudia-nê, ua-nda ku ngi thelekala." 
Mark14:19 Anga a kala ni mukondo, a kuata kuila, mu umoxi-umoxi: O kuila eme, Ngana?" 
Mark14:20 Jezú muene-phe ua vutula, uixi: Muene muthu ku kuinhi ni kiiadi, ngala kumata-nê bhu dilonga." 
Mark14:21 Kuma Monʼa Muthu ua-nda kufua kala kia muambe o Mikanda Ikola. Maji o muthu ió-phe, lamba die uoso u mu thelekala! Muthu muenho kimuua se ka mu vualele!" 
Mark14:22 O kia kala mu kudia, Jezú u katula mbolo, o kia zubha kusakidila Nzambi, u i bhasujula, anga u a uanena, uixi: Dienu! Iú uene mukutu uami." 
Mark14:23 Anga u katula o kopho, ki a zubha kusakidila Nzambi, u a bhana, ene oso ia anu-ku." 
Mark14:24 Uixi: Ia, ene o manhinga mami, a lunduluka mu mulonga ua athu avulu. Ene o manhinga a kuatesa o Kikutu Kiòbhe bhu kaẋi ka Nzambi ni athu." 
Mark14:25 Ngi mi ambela kidi, kuma eme, ku sumu ia muvide, ki ngi nu-ku dingi, kate kizuua ki nga ka i nua ia ubhe, mu Utuminu ua Nzambi." 
Mark14:26 O ki a zubha kuimba o muimbu, a tunda, aia ku Mulundu ua Midiva." 
Mark14:27 Jezú anga u ambela maxibulu mê, uixi: Enuʼenu oso mua-nda kulenga he mu ngi xa; kuma a ki soneka mu Mikanda Ikola, exi: O mubidi ngi mu jibha, o jimbudi ji muangana." 
Mark14:28 Hinu-phe ki ngi fukunuka, nga ka mi tuamenena ku Ngalileia." 
Mark14:29 Kuala Phetele-phe: Né-mbé ene oso a lenga nʼa ku xisa, eme kana!" 
Mark14:30 Jezú u vutuila Phetele, uixi: Kidi kiene ngi ku ambela kuila, eie-muene lelu, mu usuku uenhú, dikolombolo bhu di kokuela luiadi, eie ua ngi di tunu kia lutatu, ni kuila kuma eie ku ngʼ ijiia." 
Mark14:31 Phetele-phe u ki suinina kiavulu ni ku ki zuela, uixi: Ne kia ngi bhingi ngi fua kumoxi ni eie, Ngana, ki ngi ku ditunu kuila ki nga kuijiia. Maxibulu oso anga a tanga ua kienhiki." 
Mark14:32 Jezú ni maxibulu-mê anga a bhixila kididi kiòxite kikonzo, a kʼixana Ngetesemane. Jezú anga u ambela jixibulu je, uixi: Xikamenu bhenhabha, ngiie mu sambe." 
Mark14:33 Anga u katula Phetele, ni Tiiaku, ni Nzuá, phala a kale-nê bhenhobho. Kithangana kienhokio Jezú anga u kala ni mukondo, u tata kiavulu." 
Mark14:34 Anga ua ambela ene, uixi: Muẋima ua ngi kenanana kinene, bhulu-bhulu dia kufua! Xalenu bhenhabha, mu lange." 
Mark14:35 Anga muene u sondoloka-ku kofele u di bhala bhoxi, he u samba kuila se ki xikina, kithangana kiokio ki mu bhite." 
Mark14:36 Anga u kala mu samba, uixi: Abha Tata! Eie ima ioso ua i tena. Dikáu didi dia phaxi, ngi katule-diu. Maji-phe ki ngʼinda eme kana, inda ki uinda eie." 
Mark14:37 Anga uiza, u sanga o maxibulu kitatu kia aiʼâ ku kilu, anga u ambela Phetele, uixi: Ximá, kífua uie ku kilu? O kulangidila ola ngo imoxi, ua ki tokoka?" 
Mark14:38 Langenu, mu sambe, phala ki mu di bhale mu mubhetu. O nzumbi ietaia kidi kulua ni tendasá, o xitu-phe iabhuila." 
Mark14:39 Anga uia dingi u samba, mambu ene amoxi." 
Mark14:40 Anga uiza luamukuá, u a sanga aii ku kilu, kuma mu mesu mua a neme kiavulu; kioso kia mu vutuila ka kʼijiia." 
Mark14:41 Anga uiza lua katatu, u a mbela, uixi: Hanji mua zeka, muia kilu kienu? Kuabhu kia! Ola ieza-bhu! Talesenu, Monʼa Muthu a mu thelekala bhu maku ma akua ituxi." 
Mark14:42 Fundumukenu, tuienutu. Talesenu, io ua ngi thelekala ua tula." 
Mark14:43 Kithanganʼokio Jezú kioso kia kexile hanji mu zuela, Juda ua tokala ku kuinhi ni kiiadi, u tula! Ni mundu eza-nê, ambata ni jixibhata, ni jimbangala, a tundu ku jinganga ja makota, ni ku jimesene jene mu longa o Kitumu kia Nzambi, ni ku adiakime a Jijudé." 
Mark14:44 O Juda, io ua mu thelekala, ua a bhele kijimbuete, uixi: Uoso ngi mu bhana beju, muenho; mu kuatienu, muie-nê, ka mi xe." 
Mark14:45 O kia zubha kutula bhuala Jezú kithanganʼokio Juda u mu bhixila, uixi: Mesene! Anga u mu bhana jibeju." 
Mark14:46 Kienhokio anga Jezú a mu tula maku, a mu kuata." 
Mark14:47 Kua ia emana-bhu-phe, ku kala muthu, u fomona xibhata ie, he u kuama o mubhika ua nganga ia dikota, u mu batula o dítui." 
Mark14:48 Jezú anga u a kumbulula, uixi: Kífua mueza ku ngi kuata ni jixibhata, ni jimbangala, kala ngi kifumbe?" 
Mark14:49 Nga nange izuua ioso ni enu mu tembulu ni kulonga, maji ki mua ngi kuata, lembua! O kiki-phe kia bhiti, mu kukumbidila o Madivulu Makota mòsoneke." 
Mark14:50 Anga maxibulu a mu xa, ene oso, a lengʼâ." 
Mark14:51 Bhu kala-phe munzangala ua diiala, ua kexi mu kaiela Jezú, ka zuata kima, ua di futu ngo dilasola dia linhu. Anga a mu kuata;" 
Mark14:52 Muene-phe ua a xangumuka, he u a xila o dilasola bhu maku, u lenga ni thuẋiʼa thakala." 
Mark14:53 Jezú anga aia-nâ, he a mu bheka kua nganga ia dikota. Kuenhoko anga a bhongoloka-nê jinganga ja makota joso, ni adiakimeʼa Jijudé ni asoneki." 
Mark14:54 Phetele-phe ua mu kaiela Jezú dikanga ku dima, kate mu lumbu lua nganga ia dikota. Anga u bokona, he u xikama ni jifixiiadi mu kuota tubhia." 
Mark14:55 Bhenhobho, jinganga ja makota ni Kionge kioso kia Jitata, a sota umbangi ua kuêlesa Jezú ni ku mu jibha, anga a u lembua." 
Mark14:56 Sumbala jimbangi javulu ja makutu ja mu tatela, iú u zuela kiengi, o iú u zuela kiengi." 
Mark14:57 Bhu kala ni ia emana, he a bhana umbangi ua makutu, exi:" 
Mark14:58 Etu tua mu ivu kuzuela, uixi: Ngi bula o tembulu iíi, iòtunge ni maku, anga ngi tunga iengi ki iòtunge ni maku." 
Mark14:59 Kate ni enhá a tokoka kuzuela kima kimoxi. 
Mark14:60 Nganga ia dikota anga u imana bhu ʼaxaxi, u ibhula Jezú, uixi: Eie kífua, ku fundu? Kia ku tatela enhá kiedi kiebhi?" 
Mark14:61 Muene-phe ua di xibhe, nguê kukumbulula. Nganga ia dikota anga u mu kumuna dingi, uixi: Kífua eiemuene u Kristu, Monʼa Ngana Nzambi ukola?" 
Mark14:62 Jezú uixi: Eme-muene. Enuʼenu oso hadia mua ka mona Monʼa Muthu ua xikama ku madilu ma Nzambi Uatena Ioso, ni kia kejiia ni kutuluka ku matuta ma diulu!" 
Mark14:63 Nganga ia dikota, bhenhobho u tandujula izuatu ie, uixi: Jimbangi jahi dingi ngo ji tua bhindamena?" 
Mark14:64 Enuʼenu muevu o diẋongo dia ẋonguena Nzambi bhenhabha! O kiki mua fika kiebhi? Ene oso kuma a mu kitukila, anga a batula, exi: Muthu ua ku mu jibha." 
Mark14:65 Amoxi-mu anga a kuata ku mu ṗhamena mathe. A mu futa o pholo, anga a mu bhana jihome, exi: Zambulaze uoso ua ku beta! Jifixiiadi anga ji mu tambulula ni jihuxi." 
Mark14:66 Phetele kia xikama ku lumbu bhoxi, kueza monʼa kilumba ua tokala kua nganga ia dikota." 
Mark14:67 O kia mono Phetele, uala mu kuota, ua mu ixi sui, uixi: Eie ue ua kexi ni Jezú dia Nazilé." 
Mark14:68 Muene-phe ua di tunu uixi: Muenho eme ki ngi mu ijiia. Ki nga kʼijiia ue ngo kioso eie ki uala kuzuela. Anga u tubhuka ku mbalanda; kienhokio dikolombolo anga di kokola. 
Mark14:69 Monʼa kilumba anga u mu mona, u kuata kuambela athu ala-bhu, uixi: Muenhu ue ua tokala-nâ." 
Mark14:70 Muene iú ua ditunu luamukuá. Kubhanga kathangana ene ue emana-bhu, ambela Phetele, exi: Kidi kiene-ze, eie ue ua tokala-nâ, mukonda u mukua Ngalileia." 
Mark14:71 Phetele muene-phe u kuata kuxinga ni kuloka, uixi: Xinge phaietu muene! Muthu mua mu tangeʼó, ki nga muʼijiia! Se nga tange makutu, Nzambi a ngi bhane kaxtiku." 
Mark14:72 Kithanganʼokio dikolombolo di kokola lua kaiiadi. Phetele anga u tukumuka o maka a mu ambela Jezú kuila: Dikolombolo bhu dia ka kokuela luiadi, eie ua ngi di tuna lutatu. O kia zubha ku ki banza, kia mu kuata ku muẋima anga u dila." 
Mark15:1 Kithangana, ki kuakie mu kimene, jinganga ja makota, ni adiakimi a Jijudé, ni jimesene ja kulonga o Kitumu, ni Kionge kioso kia Jitata, ki bhongoloka ku maka, anga a kutisa Jezú, aia-nê mu ku mu thelekala kua Pilatu." 
Mark15:2 Pilatu anga u mu ibhula, uixi: Kífua, eie u sobha ia Jijudé? Muene uetaia, uixi: Eie-muene ua ki tange." 
Mark15:3 Jinganga ja makota anga a mu tatela ima iavulu. 
Mark15:4 Pilatu anga u mu ibhula dingi, uixi: Eie, ku fundu? Talesa o ima ioso iala ku ku tatela!" 
Mark15:5 Jezú-phe nguê dingi kukumbulula kima, Pilatu anga u diuana." 
Mark15:6 Mu Fesa-phe ia Phasu, Pilatu uene mu ku a jituina pelezo imoxi uoso a mu bhinga kuala o mundu." 
Mark15:7 Kienhokio anga kukala pelezo, dijina die Balaba, a mu kuika kumoxi ni akua a balukile-nâ, o mu kubaluka kua, a te kijibha." 
Mark15:8 O mundu anga a bhixila kua Pilatu a kuata ku mu bhinga kubhanga kioso kiene ku a bhanga jinga kia. 
Mark15:9 Pilatu ua kumbulula, uixi: Mua mesena ngi mi jituina sobha ia Jijudé?" 
Mark15:10 Kuma muene ua mono kuila, o jinganga ja makota, Jezú a mu thelekala kokue mukonda ngo dia ku mu kuatela luma." 
Mark15:11 Jinganga ja makota-phe ji kala mu funhisa o mundu, phala a bhinge ku a jituina Balaba." 
Mark15:12 Pilatu anga u kumuna dingi, uixi: O iú-phe mua mu ixana sobha ia Jijudé, ngi mu bhanga kiebhi?" 
Mark15:13 Ene a di kola dingi, exi: Mu te ku dikulusu!" 
Mark15:14 Kuala Pilatu: Phala-hi? O kituxi kie kia te, kiahi? Ene-phe a suina dingi ni ku di kola, exi: Mu te ku dikulusu! Mu te ku dikulusu!" 
Mark15:15 Anga, Pilatu, kuma ua mesena kubhomba o mundu, u jituisa Balaba. O Jezú kia zubha ku mu bhesa jixikote, u mu thelekala phala ku mu jiibha ku dikulusu." 
Mark15:16 O masoladi anga aia-nê ku lumbu lua palasu,—o Palasu ia Nguvulu,—hé a bhongolola o kompaniia ioso." 
Mark15:17 Anga a mu zuika kapote kakusuka, enda kitundu kia minha, a mu ta-kiu ku mutue." 
Mark15:18 Anga a kuata ku mu menekena exi: Tana-ku! Eie u sobha ia Jijudé! 
Mark15:19 Anga a mu beta ni muxi mu mutue, a mu ṗhamena mathe, anga a fukama, he ela kala a mu mu bheza." 
Mark15:20 O kia zubha ku mu sebulula, a mu zula o kapote kakusuka, a mu zuika o izuatu iê-muène. Anga a tubhuka mu lumbu, aia-nê ku kanga phala ku mu ta ku dikulusu." 
Mark15:21 Anga a kuata muthu uala mu bhita njila ie, ua tundu ku matutu. Muthu muenhu Ximá mukua Silene, muene uavu anʼê Xandele ni Lufu. Masoladi anga a mu bhinjika kuambata dikulusu die." 
Mark15:22 Anga Jezú eza-nê bhu Ngolongota, kífua dijina dia lombolola kuila: Kididi kia Kiholongonho." 
Mark15:23 Anga a mesena ku mu bhana vinhu iolunge ni milongo i sosolola o misusu, i exana mirra. Maji muene-phe, ngua-iê ku i tambula." 
Mark15:24 Anga a mu batela ku dikulusu, a uana izuatu ie ni ku i tela jisorte, kala muthu nʼa mone kioso kia tambula-bhu." 
Mark15:25 Mu ola ia katatu, kia mu te ku dikulusu." 
Mark15:26 Anga a soneka ku thandu o xitasá ie: Sobha ia Jijudé. 
Mark15:27 Anga a mu-ta kumoxi ku makulusu ni ifumbe iiadi. O iú ku madilu, o iu ku kiasu. [" 
Mark15:28 Anga ki bhita kala kiosoneke mu Madivulu a Nzambi, exi: Muene a mu bundu kumoxi ni ingumba.]" 
Mark15:29 Athu oso ala kubhita bhobho anga a mu nanzesa, ni kuteketesa o mítue, exi: Eiʼó, tata! U bula o tembulu he u i tinga mu izuua itatu!" 
Mark15:30 Di kudile-phe eʼ muene, u tuluke ku dikulusu!" 
Mark15:31 Ni jinganga ja makota kiòmuene ni alongi a Kitumu, a mu ondolola mudia, exi: Ua kudidile athu engi, o ku di kudila muene ua lembua!" 
Mark15:32 Kristu, Sobha ia Izalaiele, a tuluke kia ku dikulusu, tu ki mone, tu xikane! Ni enhó, o miíi a a batela-nê kumoxi ku makulusu, a muʼondolola ue." 
Mark15:33 Ku bhixila mu ola ia mediia, kua bhiti usuku ku thandu dia oxi ioso kate mu ola ia kavua." 
Mark15:34 Mu ola ia kavua. Jezú anga u di kola ni dízui dia suina: Eloi, Eloi, lama sabachthani! Uambe, mu ku ki lombolola: Nzambi iami, Nambi iami, ua ngʼehelela-hi-á?" 
Mark15:35 Amoxi emana-bhu, kia kʼivu, exi: Ivenu! Ua hendekela Elija!" 
Mark15:36 Anga bhu kala muthu, u lenga he u bonda jiponja mu mvindangele, u ji sukika ku kamuẋi, u mu bhana o kuxibha, uixi: Ambulenu! Tu mone mba Elija uiza ku mu tulula ku dikulusu!" 
Mark15:37 O Jezú-phe anga u di kola, u ta mutendu uonène, he u zubha o muenhu ue." 
Mark15:38 O kibatulu kia Tembulu, anga ki tanduka mu ʼaxaxi, anga ki di bula mu mbandu jiiadi, tunde ku thandu kate bhoxi." 
Mark15:39 Kienhokio, o kabhitangu uemana bhua zukama ni bhuala muene, kia mu mono kioso Jezú kia di kola iú ua zubhidisa, uixi: Muthu iu ua kexi monʼa Nzambi kidi!" 
Mark15:40 Sai ni ahatu emana mu kanga mu kutalesa. Mudia mu kala ni Madiia dia Manda, ni Madiia dia mamʼa Zuze ni Tiiaku dia ndenge, ni Salomé." 
Mark15:41 Ahatu enhá, kia kexile muene ku Ngalileia, a mu kaiela jinga he a kala mu ku mu dikila. Bhu kala ue ni ahatu amukuá avulu, a bande-nê ku Jeluzaleme." 
Mark15:42 Kubhiẋila mu ngoloxi, kuila kuma kua fulamana kia, mukonda kizuua kia ku di iudika, o mungu kia sabhalu," 
Mark15:43 kuiza Zuze mukua Limateia. Muenhu muadiakime ua tokala ku Kionge kia Jitata. Muene ue muthu ua kexi mu kinga o Utuminu ua Nzambi. Anga u-bhua uoma, u bokona kua Pilatu, u bhinga o kimbi kia Jezú." 
Mark15:44 Pilatu anga u kala ni phata, ki evu kuila Jezú ua zubhidisa kia. U tuma kuixana kabhitangu, u mu ibhula se ua zubhidisa kia kithangana." 
Mark15:45 O kia zubha ku kʼijiia kua kabhitangu, u tuma kubhana o kimbi kia Jezú kua Zuze." 
Mark15:46 Muene anga uiza ni thanga ia dilasola dia linhu ia fina, dia sumbu, o kia mu tulula ku dikulusu u mu aka mu thanga ia linhu, he u mu tula mu mbila ia jikuisile mu ndanji, anga u kundumuisa ditadi dionene, u di xita bhu muelu ua mbila." 
Mark15:47 Ni Madiia dia Manda, ni Madiia mamʼa Zuze, a talesa bhuoso bhua mu tula o mukutu ue." 
Mark16:1 Kia bhiti o sabhalu, Madiia dia Manda, ni Madiia mamʼa Tiiaku, ni Salomé, a sumba ima iauabha dizumba phala kuia mu ku uaia o mukutu ua Jezú." 
Mark16:2 O mu Lumingu, kizuua kia dianga kia semana, a di meneka; kia bhixila bhu mbila, dikumbi dí banda." 
Mark16:3 Bhenhobho, anga a kala mu zuela mudia, exi: Nanhi u tu kundumuina ditadi, bhu muelu ua mbila?" 
Mark16:4 O kia talesa, a mona ditadi dia kundumuka kia mu kanga. (Mbata o ditadi dia kexile dia dikota.)" 
Mark16:5 O bhenhobho ene kia bokona mu mbila, a sanga munzangala ua diiala ua xikama bhu mbandu ia kadilu, ua zuata kizuatu kiazele, kialebha. Anga a sasumuka kinene!" 
Mark16:6 Muene he ua ambela, uixi: Ki mu sasumuke! Mukonda ngejiia kuila mualu sota Jezú dia Nazalé a mu tele ku dikulusu. Muene ua fukunuka kia; bhabha kala-bhu dingi. Talesenu o kididi bhua mu tudile!" 
Mark16:7 Ndenu-phe, mua ka tangele jixibulu je, ni Phetele, kuila: Muene ua mi tuamenena kia ku Ngalileia, kuene ku mua ka di mona-nê, kala muene kia mi tangelele." 
Mark16:8 Anga a tunda, a lenga makidi-kidi bhu mbila, kuma kua a kuata kuteketa ni kudiuana. Ka zuelesa-phe muthu, kuma ala ni uoma. [" 
Mark16:9 Kiki Jezú kia zubha o kufukunuka, mu Lumingu, o kizuua kia dianga kia semana, u dianga kutukulukila Madiia dia Manda, ua mu tundisile mu mukutu ue sambuadi dia dimonho." 
Mark16:10 Muene anga uia ku ki tudila io oso a kexile-nê, mukonda ene ala mu malamba ni kudila." 
Mark16:11 O kia kʼivu kuila muene ua fukunuka, o Madiia ua di mono-nê, a ki kuata phata." 
Mark16:12 Kia bhiti imʼiíi, Jezú muene u tukulukila kiengi kiiadi mudia, kia kala mu njila ia kuia ku matutu." 
Mark16:13 Enhá anga a vutuka, aia, a ki jimbuila akua. Hanji-phe nguauâ ku a xikana ioso ia zuela." 
Mark16:14 Jezú anga u tukulukila kiua ene oso, o kuinhi ni umoxi, kia xikama mu kudia, he u a bazela mukonda dia kuxibhaka ni kukola o muẋima, mukonda nguauâ kuxikana kia zuela io oso a mu mono ua fukunuka." 
Mark16:15 Jezú anga u ambela, uixi: Ndenu mu ngongo ioso, mua ka boke o Njimbu Iambote, kate kua suku Nzambi ni kubhanga athu." 
Mark16:16 Uoso u xikana, anga a mu batizala, u bhuluka; uoso-phe ka xikana, a ka mu elesa." 
Mark16:17 Ijimbuete iíi kaiela io oso a xikana: Mu dijina diami, a ka tundisa madimonho, a ka zuela ni madimi mengi;" 
Mark16:18 a ka kuata-kuata jinhoka; se a ka nua ikola-kola, ki ia a bhange ngo kiaiibha; a ka tula maku ma ku thanduʼ a jihaxi, anga ji di sanza." 
Mark16:19 Kiki Ngana Jezú kia zubha kuzuela-nâ, a mu tambula ku diulu, iú ua xikama ku madilu ma Nzambi." 
Mark16:20 O maxibulu anga a muangana, he a boka o Njimbu Iambote mu ididi ioso. Ngana muene anga u kalakala-nê, he u kuatesa o Maka-mê ni ijimbuete ia madiuanu ia kaiela-ku.]" 
Luke1:1 Kamba diami Tiiófilu: Athu avulu kiá a kuata kusoneka mu Mikanda o ima ioso ia bhitile mu dietu. 
Luke1:2 Ene a i soneka kala kia tu tangelele na-iu oso a kexile jimbangi tunde ku dimatekenu, anga a kala jiphoxi ja diambu." 
Luke1:3 Eme uami ki nga zubha ku ibhudisa kiambote tunde ku ia tundile, ngandala, Eselênsia diê Na Tiiófilo, ku ku sonekena na-iu mu kimoxi kimoxi," 
Luke1:4 eie ue ni u ijiie o kidi kia ima ioso iene ku ku longa. 
Luke1:5 Mu izuua ia Helode, muenexi ua Judeia, mua kexile nganga ia Nzambi a mu ixana Zakadiia, ua tokala mu kibuka kia Abiia. O muhatuʼê ua tokala ue ku muiji ua Alá, o muiji ua jinganga, dijina diê Nzebele." 
Luke1:5 Mu izuua ia Helode, muenexi ua Judeia, mua kexile nganga ia Nzambi a mu ixana Zakadiia, ua tokala mu kibuka kia Abiia. O muhatuʼê ua tokala ue ku muiji ua Alá, o muiji ua jinganga, dijina diê Nzebele." 
Luke1:6 Kiiadi kiâ anga a kala athu aiuka bhu pholo ia Nzambi, athu a kuenda mu itumu ioso ni ijila ia Ngana, sé kima ki tokala ku a bazela." 
Luke1:7 Ene-phe ka moneka mona, mukonda Nzebele ua kexile mbaku; o ene kiiadi kiâ, a kuata kiá mivu iavulu." 
Luke1:8 Anga ki bhita kuma, kizuua kimoxi, Zakadiia u kala mù bhanga unganga bhu pholo ia Nzambi, mu izuua ieza-ku o kibuka kiê." 
Luke1:9 Muène anga ki mu tokala, mu kífua kia unganga, o kubokona mu Tembulu ia Ngana, mù bhanga o fumasa ia dixi dia dizumba." 
Luke1:10 O kifuẋi kioso kia diembu anga ki kala bhu kanga mù samba, kiso nganga Zakadiia kia kala mu bhakula o fumasa ia dixi dia dizumba." 
Luke1:11 Anga ku mu tukulukila mukunji ua Ngana, uemana ku mbandu ia kadilu ia kalatódio ka dizumba." 
Luke1:12 Zakadiia anga u sasumuka kia mu mono, uôma u mu kuata." 
Luke1:13 Mukunji anga u mu ambela, uixi: Ku kale ni uôma Zakadiia! Mukonda musambu ué Nzambi ua uivu. Muhatuʼé, Nzebele, ua-ndu ku vualela monʼa diiala, eie u mu luka dijina dia Nzuá." 
Luke1:14 Eie ua-ndu kala ni kutana ni kusanguluka; mu ku mu vuala kuê, athu avulu a-ndu sanguluka." 
Luke1:15 Mukonda muène u kala kota dia muthu bhu pholo ia Ngana, ka kà nua vinhu, mba kúnua kuoso-kuoso ku kodiuisa; hé uizala-phe ni Nzumbi Ikôla, tunde kiá mu divumu dia mamʼá." 
Luke1:16 Ndumba dia akua Izalaiele, ua-nda ku a biluila kua Ngana dia Nzambi iâ." 
Luke1:17 Muène u kala mukunji ua Nzambi, ua kà soka ni polofeta Elija mu nguzu ni kutena, nʼa kà bhangesa kuila o ana ni jitata a dʼivua, o ió abhukumuka a kà vutukila mu njila ia kuiuka, nʼa tena kubhangesa kuila o kifuẋi kia diembu dia Izalaiele ki di iudika mu kuxikamena o kuiza kua Ngana." 
Luke1:18 Zakadiia anga u ambela mukunji, uixi: Eme ngi kʼijiia kiebhi? Mukonda eme nga kuka kiá, ni mukajiʼami ue ua sunga-ku kiá ku izuua iê." 
Luke1:19 Mukunji anga u mu tambuijila, uixi: Eme Ngabidiiele, ngene kuimana bhu pholo ia Nzambi. Muène iu ua ngi tumu ku ku zuelesa, ku ku tudila o njimbu iíi iambote." 
Luke1:20 Kiki-phe u kala u dibubu, kutena kuzuela, katé kizuua kia kà bhita imʼiíi, mukonda eie kua xikana kizuelu kiami, maji o kiene-phe kia kà bhita bhu thembu iê." 
Luke1:21 Kiosuʼiki-phe imʼiíi iala kubhita, o kifuẋi ku kanga hanji ia kinga Zakadiia, anga a diuana mukonda dia kukokoloka kuê mu Tembulu." 
Luke1:22 Kia zubha kutunda-phe, ka tena ku a zuelesa. Anga a mu mona kuma ua diuana kisuma mu Tembulu. Muène anga u kuata ku a bhalula ni kubhanga ngó ijimbuete ni maku; u kala dibubu." 
Luke1:23 O Zakadiia, kioso kia-bhu o izuua iê ia unganga mu Tembulu, anga u vutuka ku bhata diê." 
Luke1:24 Kia bhiti izuua iòfele, muhatuʼê Nzebele anga uimita, hé u suama hanji mʼonzo mbeji jitanu, uixi:" 
Luke1:25 Eué! Ngana ua ngi bhange o mbote! Izuuʼiíi muène ia ngi xinganeka o ku ngi katula muôndo muʼaxaxi ka akuetu. Kana-ku dingi muthu ua-nda ku ngi tela dibete. 
Luke1:26 Nzebele mu kuimita kuê, kia bhixila mu mbeji ia kasamanu, mukunji Ngabidiiele anga a mu tuma kuala Nzambi, ku sanzala ia Ngalileia, a ixana Nazalé." 
Luke1:27 Mukunji uambata njimbu phala ku i tula kua monʼa muhatu, a mu lembe kiá kuala diiala dia mukua muiji ua sobha Davidi, dijina diê Zuze. O muzeletete iú dijina diê Madiia." 
Luke1:28 Mukunji anga u bokona, uixi: Nga ku menekena Madiia! Eie a ku zediuisa kiavulu kuala Nzambi! Ngana uala ni eie." 
Luke1:29 Madiia anga u sasumuka kiavulu, ki evu kizueluʼiki! Hé u kala mù banza, mba kumenekena kuahiʼoko!" 
Luke1:30 Mukunji-phe, uixi: Ku kale ni uôma, Madiia! Mukonda eie ua bongo kuzediua kua Nzambi." 
Luke1:31 Talesa, ua-ndu kuimita mu vumu dié, hinu u vuala monʼa diiala, u mu luka dijina dia Jezú." 
Luke1:32 Muène uandu kala kota dia muthu, a kà mu ixana Monʼa Nzambi ia Diulu. O Ngana Nzambi ua kà mu bhanga Sobha, kala kia kexile tatʼâ Davidi mu xahulu." 
Luke1:33 Muène ua kà tumina o dibhata dia Jakobo katé ni ku hádia. O Ungana uê ki uá kà-bhua dingi. 
Luke1:34 Madiia bhenhobho anga u ambela o mukunji, uixi: Kiki, ki bhita kiebhi, eme ki ngʼejiia luua diiala?" 
Luke1:35 Mukunji u mu vutuila, uixi: O Nzumbi Ikôla ua-ndu tuluka ku thandu dié, o nguzu ia Nzambi ia Diulu ia-nda ku ku vungina kizúzumbia kiê. Ki bhangesa kuila o mona ukôla ua-nda ku mu vuala, a mu ixana Monʼa Nzambi." 
Luke1:36 Xinganeka hanji ndandu ié Nzebele, a kexi ku mu ila mbaku, kiki uemita ue monʼa diiala mu uadikime uê; mbeji samanu kiá a mu kuata." 
Luke1:37 Mukonda kua Nzambi, kana-ku kima ki kamba kuẋikina." 
Luke1:38 Madiia uixi: Emeʼamiʼú, ngi mubhika ua Ngana. Ki ngi bhite, Ngana, kala ki ua ki zuela. Mukunji anga u tunda bhu mbandu iê." 
Luke1:39 Ki bhua bhiti tu-izuua, Madiia anga u balumuka, uia malusolo ku milundu, ku sanzala ia tokala ku Judeia." 
Luke1:39 Ki bhua bhiti tu-izuua, Madiia anga u balumuka, uia malusolo ku milundu, ku sanzala ia tokala ku Judeia." 
Luke1:40 Anga u bokona mʼonzo ia Zakadiia, u menekena Nzebele." 
Luke1:41 Bhenhobho Nzebele ki evu umenekenu ua Madiia, monʼê mu mala ua tuka. Nzebele anga uizala ni Nzumbi Ikôla." 
Luke1:42 Anga u di kola ni dízui dia suina, uixi: Eie ua beta kuzediua mu ahatu ni akuenu! Mu tuana ue ua beta o kuzediua monʼé uanda ku mu vuala!" 
Luke1:43 Eme kia ngi tundila kuebhi, kuila mamʼa Ngana iami uiza ku ngi zungila?" 
Luke1:44 Talesa, kia ngi bhixila mu mátui o dízui dia umenekenu ué, mona mu mala diami ua tuka ni kusanguluka!" 
Luke1:45 Eie ua zediua, mukonda ua xikana kuma hinu i bhita, ioso ia ku tudila kua Ngana." 
Luke1:46 Kuala Madiia: Muẋima uami ua ximana Ngana," 
Luke1:47 o nzumbi iami ia sanguluka mua Nzambi, Kibha-muenhu kiami." 
Luke1:48 Mukonda muène ua te mesu mu kutola kua mubhikʼê! Talesa, tunde lelu, miji ioso ia-ndu ngi tumbula kuma ngi muhatu ua zediua." 
Luke1:49 Mukonda Muteniʼa ioso ua ngi bhange ima iònene; dijina diê di kôla! 
Luke1:50 O henda iê ia kalé ku miji ni miji ku thandu dia iá oso a mu xila. 
Luke1:51 Ua bhange ima ia nguzu ni lúkuaku luê, ua muanganesa akua izala mu ikutu ia miẋima iâ." 
Luke1:52 Anʼa jingana ua a tulula ku iandu, iú ua bandesa-ku a tolo o majina." 
Luke1:53 Uezalesa akua nzala ni jimbote, o jimvuama ua ji kaie ni maku mòkukutu." 
Luke1:54 Ua kuatekesa Izalaiele dia mubhikʼê, Iú ua banze o henda iê, kala ki ambelele o jitata jetu." 
Luke1:55 Mukonda ua xinganeka o henda ia kuatela Mbalahamu ni luvualu luê, katé ku mivu ni mivu!" 
Luke1:56 Madiia anga ukala ni Nzebele mu jimbeji jitatu. Ki ja-bhu, anga u vutuka ku bhata diê." 
Luke1:57 Kiki izuua ia Nzebele, ia kuvuala, i bhixila, anga u vuala monʼa diiala." 
Luke1:58 Akua bhata ni jindandu jê, anga évua kuma Ngana ua mu vudixila o henda iê, anga ene oso a sanguluka-nê kumoxi." 
Luke1:59 Kizuua kia kanake anga eza kusaia o kamona. Anga a mesena ku mu ixana dijina dia tatʼâ Zakadiia. 
Luke1:60 Manhʼâ-phe u tambuijila, uixi: Kana! Kikale dijina diê a mu luka Nzuá." 
Luke1:61 Akuâ a mu ambela, exi: Ku muiji ué ki kuene muthu ni dijina diodio!" 
Luke1:62 Anga a bhalula tatʼâ, ni ku mu bhangela ijimbuete, se uandala o mona a mu luka nanhi." 
Luke1:63 Zakadiia anga u bhinga kadibaia ka kusonekena, anga u soneka, uixi: Dijina diê Nzuá. Ene oso anga a diuana!" 
Luke1:64 Kathanganʼoko dikanu diê di jikuka, ni dimi diê di jituka, Zakadiia anga u kala dingi mù zuela ni kuximana Nzambi." 
Luke1:65 Jinzukame jê, ene oso a tungu bhobho, uôma anga u a kuata. Ima ioso iíi anga i fumana mu milundu ioso ia Judeia." 
Luke1:65 Jinzukame jê, ene oso a tungu bhobho, uôma anga u a kuata. Ima ioso iíi anga i fumana mu milundu ioso ia Judeia." 
Luke1:66 Oso muene a ívua, anga a i lunda ku muẋima, exi: O monʼú, ua-ndu kala kiebhi? Lúkuaku-phe lua Ngana, lu kala ni muène." 
Luke1:67 Zakadiia, dia Tatʼâ, anga uizala ni Nzumbi Ikôla, hé u kala mù zambula uixi:" 
Luke1:68 Sakidilenu Ngana, Nzambi ia Izalaiele! Kuma mundu uê ua u zungila, ua u kula;" 
Luke1:69 ua tu zangelekela Mubhuludi ua nguzu phala ku tu bhulula u tundu mu mbutu ia mubhikʼê Davidi— 
Luke1:70 kala kia zuela mu kanu dia jipolofeta jê tunde xahulu— 
Luke1:71 kuma Nzambi ua tanga ku tu bhulula bhu maku ma jinguma jetu, ni bhu maku ma oso a tu kuatela lûma;" 
Luke1:72 uambe kulondekesa o henda ku jitata jetu, ni kulembalala o kikutu kiê kia ngene." 
Luke1:73 Kia mulôko, ua lokelele Mbalahamu tatʼetu," 
Luke1:74 kuila u tu kudila bhu maku ma jinguma jetu, phala tu mu kalakele muène sé uôma," 
Luke1:75 mu kuzela ni kuiuka bhu pholo iê, izuua ietu ioso." 
Luke1:76 Eie-phe kamona, a-nda ku kuixana Polofeta ia Nzambi ia Diulu. Kuma ua kà tuamenena bhu pholo ia Ngana mu ku mu iudikila jinjila jê;" 
Luke1:77 ni kuijidisa athuʼê ki kala o kubhuluka, mu ku a loloka o ituxi iâ," 
Luke1:78 mukonda Nzambi ietu, Nzambi ia jihenda ni mbote! Ua bhangesa Dikumbi-dia-Thunda ku tu zungila,"
